Further, we empirically show how LLMs rely on superficial heuristics such as answer position and distractor patterns for multiple-choice questions. Finally, we also compare LLM-as-a-judge evaluation with human evaluation for open-ended questions assess its reliability in a low-resource language. We argue that such fine-grained evaluation is essential for understanding model limitations and can inform the development of more linguistically capable LLMs, while also serving as a foundation for future research in Telugu NLP. Our dataset is available at: https://huggingface.co/datasets/TeluguLLMResearch/MATA

light_analysis.overview: 论文引入MATA数据集，细粒度评估大型语言模型在泰卢固语中的能力，并揭示其依赖肤浅启发式的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决大型语言模型（LLMs）在低资源语言如泰卢固语中评估不足的实际问题。现有方法往往缺乏语言特异性评估数据集，无法全面分析模型在特定语言任务中的表现和限制，这对多语言NLP发展构成挑战。通过创建MATA数据集，本研究强调了细粒度评估的重要性，以促进更准确的模型能力理解和改进，特别是在支持低资源语言的AI应用中。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出MATA数据集，包含729个精心策划的多项选择题和开放式问题，覆盖多种语言维度。关键创新点包括评估11个开源和闭源LLMs，并进行细粒度性能分析。此外，研究实证展示了LLMs如何依赖答案位置和干扰项模式等肤浅启发式处理多项选择题，并比较了LLM-as-a-judge评估与人类评估在开放式问题中的可靠性，为自动评估方法提供技术参考。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，不同LLMs在泰卢固语任务中表现出差异化的能力水平，评估揭示了模型性能的细粒度变化。分析表明，模型在处理多项选择题时经常依赖启发式策略，如根据答案位置或干扰项模式进行选择，这可能影响评估准确性。与人类评估的对比显示，LLM-as-a-judge方法在低资源语言中的可靠性得到初步评估，为未来优化自动评估工具提供了实证依据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是引入MATA数据集和细粒度评估框架，有助于深入理解LLMs在泰卢固语中的局限性。其学术价值在于推动多语言NLP评估标准的发展，实际应用上可指导开发更具语言能力的模型。未来工作可包括扩展数据集到其他低资源语言，以及改进评估技术以降低启发式依赖，促进更全面的模型性能分析。

title: Learning from Oblivion: Predicting Knowledge Overflowed Weights via Retrodiction of Forgetting
abstract: Pre-trained weights have become a cornerstone of modern deep learning, enabling efficient knowledge transfer and improving downstream task performance, especially in data-scarce scenarios. However, a fundamental question remains: how can we obtain better pre-trained weights that encapsulate more knowledge beyond the given dataset? In this work, we introduce KNowledge-Overflowed Weights (KNOW) prediction, a novel strategy that leverages structured forgetting and its inversion to synthesize knowledge-enriched weights. Our key insight is that sequential fine-tuning on progressively downsized datasets induces a structured forgetting process, which can be modeled and reversed to recover knowledge as if trained on a larger dataset. We construct a dataset of weight transitions governed by this controlled forgetting and employ meta-learning to model weight prediction effectively. Specifically, our KNowledge-Overflowed Weights Nowcaster (KNOWN) acts as a hyper-model that learns the general evolution of weights and predicts enhanced weights with improved generalization. Extensive experiments across diverse datasets and architectures demonstrate that KNOW prediction consistently outperforms Naive fine-tuning and simple weight prediction, leading to superior downstream performance. Our work provides a new perspective on reinterpreting forgetting dynamics to push the limits of knowledge transfer. The code and pre-trained model are available at https://github.com/jjh6297/KNOW

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了KNOW预测策略，通过建模和逆转结构化遗忘过程来合成知识增强的预训练权重，提升知识转移效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 预训练权重在现代深度学习中扮演关键角色，尤其在数据稀缺场景下促进知识转移和提高下游任务性能。然而，现有方法通常局限于给定数据集的有限知识，难以获取超出数据集的丰富知识。本研究旨在解决这一问题，通过探索遗忘过程的逆转来预测知识溢出的权重，以增强预训练模型的泛化能力，弥补现有知识转移方法的不足。约150字
light_analysis.method: KNOW预测策略的核心在于利用结构化遗忘及其逆转：首先，在逐渐缩小的数据集上进行顺序微调以诱导结构化遗忘过程；然后，构建一个由这种受控遗忘控制的权重转换数据集；接着，采用元学习方法训练KNOWN超模型，该模型学习权重的通用演化模式，并预测出具有改进泛化能力的增强权重。关键创新点是将遗忘视为可逆过程，通过逆转模拟在更大数据集上训练的效果。约150字
light_analysis.result: 在多种数据集和不同架构上进行的广泛实验表明，KNOW预测方法在性能上一致优于朴素的微调方法和简单的权重预测方法，显著提升了下游任务的泛化性能。尽管摘要未明确说明具体数值指标（如准确率提升百分比），但实验结果显示该方法在知识转移方面具有优越性，验证了通过逆转遗忘过程预测权重策略的有效性。约150字
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了一种通过预测知识溢出权重来增强预训练权重的新方法，为重新解释遗忘动态提供了新视角，推动了知识转移的极限。学术价值体现在为元学习和权重优化领域提供了新思路，实际应用价值在于在数据稀缺场景中提升模型性能。未来工作可能包括将该方法扩展到更多架构和应用场景，以及深入探索遗忘过程的建模。约150字

title: Look Before You Fuse: 2D-Guided Cross-Modal Alignment for Robust 3D Detection
abstract: Integrating LiDAR and camera inputs into a unified Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) representation is crucial for enhancing 3D perception capabilities of autonomous vehicles. However, existing methods suffer from spatial misalignment between LiDAR and camera features, which causes inaccurate depth supervision in camera branch and erroneous fusion during cross-modal feature aggregation. The root cause of this misalignment lies in projection errors, stemming from calibration inaccuracies and rolling shutter effect.The key insight of this work is that locations of these projection errors are not random but highly predictable, as they are concentrated at object-background boundaries which 2D detectors can reliably identify. Based on this, our main motivation is to utilize 2D object priors to pre-align cross-modal features before fusion. To address local misalignment, we propose Prior Guided Depth Calibration (PGDC), which leverages 2D priors to alleviate misalignment and preserve correct cross-modal feature pairs. To resolve global misalignment, we introduce Discontinuity Aware Geometric Fusion (DAGF) to suppress residual noise from PGDC and explicitly enhance sharp depth transitions at object-background boundaries, yielding a structurally aware representation. To effectively utilize these aligned representations, we incorporate Structural Guidance Depth Modulator (SGDM), using a gated attention mechanism to efficiently fuse aligned depth and image features. Our method achieves SOTA performance on nuScenes validation dataset, with its mAP and NDS reaching 71.5% and 73.6% respectively. Additionally, on the Argoverse 2 validation set, we achieve a competitive mAP of 41.7%.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了一种利用 D 引导的跨模态对齐方法，通过预对齐 LiDAR 和相机特征，以提高自动驾驶中的 3D 检测鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆依赖 LiDAR 和相机的融合来构建鸟瞰视图表示，以实现准确的 D 感知。然而，现有方法存在空间错位问题，由投影错误（如校准不准确和滚动快门效应）引起，导致相机分支的深度监督不准确和跨模态特征融合错误，从而削弱感知性能。该研究的动机是利用可预测的错位位置，即通过 D 物体检测器识别的物体背景边界，来预先对齐跨模态特征，解决这一根本问题。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括三个关键组件：Prior Guided Depth Calibration (PGDC) 利用 D 物体先验缓解局部错位，保留正确的跨模态特征对；Discontinuity Aware Geometric Fusion (DAGF) 处理全局错位，抑制 PGDC 残留噪声并增强物体背景边界的深度过渡；Structural Guidance Depth Modulator (SGDM) 采用门控注意力机制高效融合对齐后的深度和图像特征，形成结构感知的表示。这些方法在融合前实现跨模态特征对齐，技术特色在于利用 D 先验进行几何优化。
light_analysis.result: 在 nuScenes 验证数据集上，该方法达到了最先进的性能，平均精确率 (mAP) 为 71.5%，标准化检测分数 (NDS) 为 73.6%。在 Argoverse D 验证集上，也表现出竞争力，mAP 为 41.7%。这些数据表明，通过解决跨模态错位问题，方法显著提升了 D 检测的准确性和鲁棒性。摘要未明确说明与基线的详细对比，但通过 SOTA 性能可推断优于现有方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出了一套基于 D 引导的跨模态对齐技术，包括 PGDC、DAGF 和 SGDM，有效解决了 LiDAR 和相机融合中的空间错位问题，增强了 D 检测的鲁棒性。这为自动驾驶车辆的精确感知提供了新思路，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。摘要未明确说明未来工作方向或局限性。

title: MLlm-DR: Towards Explainable Depression Recognition with MultiModal Large Language Models
abstract: Automated depression diagnosis aims to analyze multimodal information from interview videos to predict participants' depression scores. Previous studies often lack clear explanations of how these scores were determined, limiting their adoption in clinical practice. While the advent of LLMs provides a possible pathway for explainable depression diagnosis, current LLMs capable of processing multimodal data lack training on interview data, resulting in poor diagnostic performance when used directly. In this paper, we propose a novel multimodal large language model (MLlm-DR) that can understand multimodal information inputs and supports explainable depression diagnosis. MLlm-DR integrates a smaller LLMs and a lightweight query module (LQ-former). Specifically, the smaller LLMs is designed to generate depression scores and corresponding evaluation rationales. To enhance its logical reasoning for domain-specific tasks while maintaining practicality, we constructed a robust training dataset to fine-tune it. Meanwhile, the LQ-former captures depression-related features from speech and visual data, aiding the model's ability to process multimodal information, to achieve comprehensive depression diagnosis. Our approach achieves state-of-the-art results on two interview-based benchmark datasets, CMDC and E-DAIC-WOZ, demonstrating its effectiveness and superiority.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出了一种基于多模态大型语言模型的可解释抑郁症诊断方法，结合小型LLM和轻量级查询模块，实现分数预测与理由生成的一体化。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动抑郁症诊断旨在通过分析访谈视频的多模态信息预测抑郁分数，但现有方法常缺乏对决策过程的解释，限制了临床实践中的可接受性。尽管大型语言模型为生成解释提供了可能，但当前多模态LLMs未经过专业访谈数据训练，直接应用时性能不佳。因此，开发一个既能处理多模态输入又能提供可解释结果的系统是必要的，以提升诊断的透明度和可靠性，满足临床应用的严格要求。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出MLlm-DR，一种多模态大型语言模型框架，集成一个较小的LLM和一个轻量级查询模块LQ-former。较小LLM负责生成抑郁分数和评估理由，通过构建的鲁棒训练数据集进行微调，以增强在抑郁症诊断任务中的逻辑推理能力。LQ-former则从语音和视觉数据中提取抑郁相关特征，辅助模型融合多模态信息，实现端到端的全面诊断。这种设计结合了模型的可解释性和多模态处理能力。
light_analysis.result: MLlm-DR在两个基于访谈的基准数据集CMDC和E-DAIC-WOZ上进行了评估，结果显示该方法达到了最先进的性能，证明了其在可解释抑郁症诊断中的有效性和优越性。然而，摘要未明确提供具体的准确率、F1分数或其他量化指标来详细对比基线方法，仅指出模型在整体任务表现上领先，后续详细数据需参考论文完整内容。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是开发了MLlm-DR，一个能够理解多模态信息并支持可解释抑郁症诊断的系统，通过结合小型LLM和LQ-former模块，不仅提高了诊断准确性，还增强了结果的可解释性。学术上，该方法推动了多模态LLMs在心理健康领域的应用，促进了可解释AI的发展；实践中，有望辅助临床医生进行更可靠的抑郁评估。未来工作可能包括在更多数据集上验证模型泛化能力、优化模态融合策略或扩展至其他心理健康问题。

title: MOBODY: Model Based Off-Dynamics Offline Reinforcement Learning
abstract: We study off-dynamics offline reinforcement learning, where the goal is to learn a policy from offline source and limited target datasets with mismatched dynamics. Existing methods either penalize the reward or discard source transitions occurring in parts of the transition space with high dynamics shift. As a result, they optimize the policy using data from low-shift regions, limiting exploration of high-reward states in the target domain that do not fall within these regions. Consequently, such methods often fail when the dynamics shift is significant or the optimal trajectories lie outside the low-shift regions. To overcome this limitation, we propose MOBODY, a Model-Based Off-Dynamics Offline RL algorithm that optimizes a policy using learned target dynamics transitions to explore the target domain, rather than only being trained with the low dynamics-shift transitions. For the dynamics learning, built on the observation that achieving the same next state requires taking different actions in different domains, MOBODY employs separate action encoders for each domain to encode different actions to the shared latent space while sharing a unified representation of states and a common transition function. We further introduce a target Q-weighted behavior cloning loss in policy optimization to avoid out-of-distribution actions, which push the policy toward actions with high target-domain Q-values, rather than high source domain Q-values or uniformly imitating all actions in the offline dataset. We evaluate MOBODY on a wide range of MuJoCo and Adroit benchmarks, demonstrating that it outperforms state-of-the-art off-dynamics RL baselines as well as policy learning methods based on different dynamics learning baselines, with especially pronounced improvements in challenging scenarios where existing methods struggle.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出MOBODY，一种基于模型的离线动态不匹配强化学习算法，通过目标动态学习和Q加权行为克隆损失改善策略探索，解决了现有方法在动态偏移显著时的限制。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究针对off-dynamics offline reinforcement learning问题，即从离线源数据和有限目标数据中学习策略，但两者动态不匹配。现有方法通过惩罚奖励或丢弃高动态偏移的转换，仅优化低偏移区域的数据，这限制了探索高奖励状态，导致在动态偏移显著或最优轨迹位于低偏移区域外时失败。这种限制在实际应用中尤为重要，例如跨域机器人控制，其中动态差异可能影响策略性能，因此需要一种新方法来有效利用数据并处理动态不匹配。
light_analysis.method: MOBODY是一种基于模型的off-dynamics offline RL算法，它通过学习目标动态转换来探索目标域，而非仅依赖低动态偏移转换。核心创新包括使用分离的动作编码器为每个域编码动作到共享潜在空间，同时共享统一的状态表示和转移函数，以捕获动态差异。此外，引入目标Q加权的行为克隆损失，在策略优化中避免分布外动作，推动策略朝向高目标域Q值的动作，而不是高源域Q值或盲目模仿离线数据集中的所有动作。方法设计基于观察到在不同域中实现相同下一状态需要不同动作的洞察。
light_analysis.result: 在广泛的MuJoCo和Adroit基准上评估，MOBODY显著优于state-of-the-art的off-dynamics RL基线以及基于不同动态学习基线的方法。实验结果表明，该算法在性能指标上有明显提升，特别在挑战性场景中，如动态偏移显著或最优轨迹不在低偏移区域时，现有方法难以处理，而MOBODY表现出更优的探索能力和策略学习效果。摘要未明确说明具体准确率数据，但强调了整体改进的显著性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MOBODY通过模型学习和目标Q加权损失，有效解决了off-dynamics offline RL中动态不匹配导致的探索限制问题。其贡献在于提出了一种创新算法，能够在动态偏移大的情况下学习高性能策略，推动了该领域的学术进展，并具有实际应用价值，如机器人适应不同环境。未来工作可扩展该方法到更复杂的动态变化场景或探索其他损失函数以进一步提升鲁棒性。

title: An Introduction to Flow Matching and Diffusion Models
abstract: Diffusion and flow-based models have become the state of the art for generative AI across a wide range of data modalities, including images, videos, shapes, molecules, music, and more. This tutorial provides a self-contained introduction to diffusion and flow-based generative models from first principles. We systematically develop the necessary mathematical background in ordinary and stochastic differential equations and derive the core algorithms of flow matching and denoising diffusion models. We then provide a step-by-step guide to building image and video generators, including training methods, guidance, and architectural design. This course is ideal for machine learning researchers who want to develop a principled understanding of the theory and practice of generative AI.

light_analysis.overview: 这篇教程论文系统性地介绍了扩散和基于流生成模型的理论基础与实践指南，旨在帮助机器学习研究者深入理解生成AI。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散和基于流的生成模型在图像、视频、音乐等多种数据模态中已成为生成AI的先进方法，具有广泛应用前景。然而，由于其涉及复杂的数学原理和算法，现有资源往往零散，缺乏系统性入门教程。本论文旨在解决这一问题，通过提供一个自包含的教程，从第一原理出发，帮助机器学习研究者建立对这些模型的理论理解和实践能力，以促进领域知识的普及和应用。
light_analysis.method: 论文从常微分方程（ODEs）和随机微分方程（SDEs）的数学背景入手，系统推导流匹配（Flow Matching）和去噪扩散模型（Denoising Diffusion Models）的核心算法。关键创新点在于将复杂理论分解为逐步可理解的步骤，并结合实践指导。具体方法包括：先建立数学基础，再推导模型算法，最后提供构建图像和视频生成器的详细指南，涵盖训练方法、指导技术（如条件生成）和架构设计。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，因为这是一篇教程性质的论文，不涉及实验研究。教程的效果主要体现在知识传递和技能培养上，而非性能指标的对比。基于推断，教程可能帮助学习者理解和应用扩散与流模型，从而在实际项目中实现高质量的生成任务。与基线方法的对比不适用，但教程的实用价值在于提供系统的学习路径。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提供了一个全面、自包含的教程，覆盖扩散和基于流生成模型的理论推导和实践应用。学术上，它深化了对生成AI模型的理解，为研究者提供了坚实的基础；实际应用上，它指导构建高效的图像和视频生成系统。潜在的局限性可能在于教程范围有限，未来工作可以扩展到其他数据模态或更高级技术。

title: HyperMotionX: The Dataset and Benchmark with DiT-Based Pose-Guided Human Image Animation of Complex Motions
abstract: Recent advances in diffusion models have significantly improved conditional video generation, particularly in the pose-guided human image animation task. Although existing methods are capable of generating high-fidelity and time-consistent animation sequences in regular motions and static scenes. However there are still obvious limitations when facing complex human body motions that contain highly dynamic, non-standard motions, and the lack of a high-quality benchmark for evaluation of complex human motion animations. To address this challenge, we propose a concise yet powerful DiT-based human animation generation baseline and design spatial low-frequency enhanced RoPE, a novel module that selectively enhances low-frequency spatial feature modeling by introducing learnable frequency scaling. Furthermore, we introduce the Open-HyperMotionX Dataset and HyperMotionX Bench, which provide high-quality human pose annotations and curated video clips for evaluating and improving pose-guided human image animation models under complex human motion conditions. Our method significantly improves structural stability and appearance consistency in highly dynamic human motion sequences. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of our dataset and proposed approach in advancing the generation quality of complex human motion image animations. The codes, model weights, and dataset have been made publicly available at https://vivocameraresearch.github.io/hypermotion/

light_analysis.overview: 提出了基于DiT的姿态引导人体图像动画生成方法，结合空间低频增强RoPE模块，并引入了新数据集和基准以处理复杂人体运动。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在姿态引导人体图像动画任务中虽有进展，但现有方法面对复杂人体运动（如高度动态和非标准动作）时仍显不足，结构稳定性和外观一致性较差，且缺乏高质量基准用于评估。这一问题限制了动画模型在实际应用（如虚拟现实和视频生成）中的性能，因此需开发新方法和数据集来提升复杂运动动画的生成质量和评估标准。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个简洁而强大的基于DiT的人体动画生成基线，核心创新是设计了空间低频增强RoPE模块，通过引入可学习频率缩放选择性增强低频空间特征建模，以改善动态序列的稳定性。此外，构建了Open-HyperMotionX数据集和HyperMotionX基准，包含高质量人体姿态标注和精选视频片段，专门用于在复杂运动条件下评估和改进姿态引导动画模型，支持模型训练和性能验证。
light_analysis.result: 实验证明所提方法能显著提高复杂人体运动序列的结构稳定性和外观一致性，通过大量对比实验验证了其在动画生成质量上的有效性。但与基线方法的详细性能对比和具体指标（如准确率或效率改进）摘要未明确说明，仅强调在高度动态场景中表现优异，推动了复杂运动动画的进步。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于提出新动画生成方法、数据集和基准，并公开代码和模型权重，这为复杂人体运动动画研究提供了关键资源和技术基础，具有重要学术价值和应用潜力。未来工作可扩展至更多运动类型和场景，以进一步优化模型泛化能力和实际部署效果。

title: On the Dynamic Regret of Following the Regularized Leader: Optimism with History Pruning
abstract: We revisit the Follow the Regularized Leader (FTRL) framework for Online Convex Optimization (OCO) over compact sets, focusing on achieving dynamic regret guarantees. Prior work has highlighted the framework's limitations in dynamic environments due to its tendency to produce "lazy" iterates. However, building on insights showing FTRL's ability to produce "agile" iterates, we show that it can indeed recover known dynamic regret bounds through optimistic composition of future costs and careful linearization of past costs, which can lead to pruning some of them. This new analysis of FTRL against dynamic comparators yields a principled way to interpolate between lazy and agile updates and offers several benefits, including refined control over regret terms, optimism without cyclic dependence, and the application of minimal recursive regularization akin to AdaFTRL. More broadly, we show that it is not the "lazy" projection style of FTRL that hinders (optimistic) dynamic regret, but the decoupling of the algorithm's state (linearized history) from its iterates, allowing the state to grow arbitrarily. Instead, pruning synchronizes these two when necessary.

light_analysis.overview: 本文重新分析了FTRL框架，通过乐观组合未来成本和历史修剪，在动态在线凸优化中实现了更好的遗憾保证，允许在懒与敏捷更新之间插值。
light_analysis.motivation: 在线凸优化在动态环境中的性能至关重要，因为实际应用如推荐系统或金融交易中数据分布常随时间变化。现有FTRL框架因产生'懒'迭代而在动态遗憾上表现不佳，先前研究指出其状态（线性化历史）与迭代解耦，导致状态任意增长，限制了在变化环境中的适应性。这凸显了改进FTRL动态性能的必要性，以应对动态比较器带来的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 方法基于FTRL框架，通过乐观组合未来成本并线性化过去成本，引入历史修剪策略来同步算法状态与迭代。关键创新包括使用乐观性避免循环依赖，并应用最小递归正则化（类似AdaFTRL），这提供了在懒和敏捷更新之间的灵活插值机制，从而精细控制遗憾项。技术特色在于通过修剪来管理线性化历史，防止状态无限增长。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率或效率数据，但指出新分析使FTRL能够恢复已知动态遗憾界限，并与基线方法相比，提供了更好的控制能力和无循环依赖的乐观性。这理论上提升了动态环境下的优化性能，但缺乏实验验证，需进一步研究具体应用效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了一种原则性方法来克服FTRL在动态环境中的局限性，通过历史修剪同步状态与迭代，实现了更好的动态遗憾保证。学术上深化了FTRL的理论分析，实践上有助于设计更高效的在线优化算法，未来工作可探索具体实现、扩展到其他领域或评估实际应用价值。

title: Benchmarking Endoscopic Surgical Image Restoration and Beyond
abstract: In endoscopic surgery, a clear and high-quality visual field is critical for surgeons to make accurate intraoperative decisions. However, persistent visual degradation, including smoke generated by energy devices, lens fogging from thermal gradients, and lens contamination due to blood or tissue fluid splashes during surgical procedures, severely impairs visual clarity. These degenerations can seriously hinder surgical workflow and pose risks to patient safety. To systematically investigate and address various forms of surgical scene degradation, we introduce a real- world open-source surgical image restoration dataset covering endoscopic environments, called SurgClean, which involves multi-type image restoration tasks from two medical sites, i.e., desmoking, defogging, and desplashing. SurgClean comprises 3,113 images with diverse degradation types and corresponding paired reference labels. Based on SurgClean, we establish a standardized evaluation benchmark and provide performance for 22 representative generic task-specific image restoration approaches, including 12 generic and 10 task-specific image restoration approaches. Experimental results reveal substantial performance gaps relative to clinical requirements, highlighting a critical opportunity for algorithm advancements in intelligent surgical restoration. Furthermore, we explore the degradation discrepancies between surgical and natural scenes from structural perception and semantic under- standing perspectives, providing fundamental insights for domain-specific image restoration research. Our work aims to empower restoration algorithms and improve the efficiency of clinical procedures.
comment: This work has been accepted by CVPR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出开源手术图像恢复数据集SurgClean，建立评估基准，并探讨手术与自然场景退化差异，推动智能手术恢复算法发展。
light_analysis.motivation: 内窥镜手术中，由于能量设备产生的烟雾、热梯度导致的镜头雾化以及血液或组织液溅射造成的污染，视觉退化问题频发，严重影响医生视野清晰度和手术安全性。现有图像恢复方法多针对自然场景，未充分适配手术环境的特殊性，导致恢复效果不足。因此，系统研究手术图像恢复对于提升临床决策准确性和患者安全至关重要，摘要未明确说明现有具体方法的不足细节。
light_analysis.method: 研究引入了真实世界开源手术图像恢复数据集SurgClean，包含3,113张图像，涵盖去烟、去雾、去污等多类型恢复任务，并配有配对参考标签。基于此，建立了标准化评估基准，评估了22种代表性图像恢复方法，包括12种通用和10种任务特定方法。此外，从结构感知和语义理解角度分析了手术场景与自然场景的退化差异，为领域特定图像恢复提供技术路线和关键创新点。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，现有22种图像恢复方法在SurgClean数据集上的表现相对于临床需求存在显著性能差距。摘要未明确说明具体准确率或效率数据，但揭示恢复效果未达到理想水平，突显出智能手术图像恢复算法的改进空间。与基线方法相比，任务特定方法可能在某些方面表现更优，但整体仍有不足，强调了算法优化的关键机会。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于提供了SurgClean数据集和标准化评估基准，为手术图像恢复研究奠定了数据基础。学术上，探索了手术与自然场景的退化差异，推动领域特定恢复算法发展；实际上，旨在赋能恢复算法，提高内窥镜手术的临床效率和安全性。未来工作可聚焦于开发更高效的手术专用恢复模型，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Echo Planning for Autonomous Driving: From Current Observations to Future Trajectories and Back
abstract: Modern end-to-end autonomous driving systems suffer from a critical limitation: their planners lack mechanisms to enforce temporal consistency between predicted trajectories and evolving scene dynamics. This absence of self-supervision allows early prediction errors to compound catastrophically over time. We introduce Echo Planning (EchoP), a new self-correcting framework that establishes an end-to-end Current - Future - Current (CFC) cycle to harmonize trajectory prediction with scene coherence. Our key insight is that plausible future trajectories should be bi-directionally consistent, i.e., not only generated from current observations but also capable of reconstructing them. The CFC mechanism first predicts future trajectories from the Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) scene representation, then inversely maps these trajectories back to estimate the current BEV state. By enforcing consistency between the original and reconstructed BEV representations through a cycle loss, the framework intrinsically penalizes physically implausible or misaligned trajectories. Experiments on nuScenes show that the proposed method yields competitive performance, reducing L2 error (Avg) by -0.04 m and collision rate by -0.12% compared to one-shot planners. Moreover, EchoP seamlessly extends to closed-loop evaluation, i.e., Bench2Drive, attaining a 26.54% success rate. Notably, EchoP requires no additional supervision: the CFC cycle acts as an inductive bias that stabilizes long-horizon planning. Overall, EchoP offers a simple, deployable pathway to improve reliability in safety-critical autonomous driving.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了Echo Planning (EchoP)框架，通过Current-Future-Current循环实现自动驾驶轨迹预测的自校正和双向一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代端到端自动驾驶系统的规划器缺乏强制预测轨迹与动态场景之间时间一致性的机制，导致早期预测错误随时间累积，可能引发灾难性后果。在安全关键的自动驾驶应用中，这种局限性尤为严重，现有方法如单次规划器未考虑一致性，从而降低长期规划的可靠性和稳定性。因此，需要新机制确保轨迹预测的物理合理性和时间一致性，以提升系统安全性。
light_analysis.method: EchoP框架建立了端到端的Current-Future-Current (CFC)循环作为自校正机制。首先，从鸟瞰图（BEV）场景表示预测未来轨迹；然后，通过逆映射这些轨迹重建当前BEV状态。关键创新在于双向一致性概念，即合理轨迹应既能从当前观测生成又能重建它们。使用循环损失强制原始与重建BEV表示的一致性，惩罚物理不合理或错位的轨迹。该方法以CFC循环作为归纳偏差，无需额外监督，在nuScenes数据集上验证。
light_analysis.result: 在nuScenes数据集上的实验显示，EchoP相较于单次规划器表现优异：平均L2误差降低了0.04米，碰撞率降低了0.12%。此外，该方法无缝扩展至闭环评估环境如Bench2Drive，实现了26.54%的成功率。这些结果证实EchoP通过CFC循环的内在一致性机制，显著改善了轨迹预测的准确性和安全性，与基线方法对比显示出竞争性性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: EchoP的主要贡献是提出一个自校正框架，通过CFC循环强制轨迹预测的时间一致性，提升自动驾驶系统的可靠性。其学术价值在于引入双向一致性作为归纳偏差，无需额外监督即可稳定长期规划。实际应用上，EchoP提供了一个简单、可部署的途径，适用于安全关键场景。局限性未明确说明，未来工作可能包括扩展到更复杂动态环境或集成其他规划组件。

title: A quantitative analysis of semantic information in deep representations of text and images
abstract: It was recently observed that the representations of different models that process identical or semantically related inputs tend to align. We analyze this phenomenon using the Information Imbalance, an asymmetric rank-based measure that quantifies the capability of a representation to predict another, providing a proxy of the cross-entropy which can be computed efficiently in high-dimensional spaces. By measuring the Information Imbalance between representations generated by DeepSeek-V3 processing translations, we find that semantic information is spread across many tokens, and that semantic predictability is strongest in a set of central layers of the network, robust across six language pairs. We measure clear information asymmetries: English representations are systematically more predictive than those of other languages, and DeepSeek-V3 representations are more predictive of those in a smaller model such as Llama3-8b than the opposite. In the visual domain, we observe that semantic information concentrates in middle layers for autoregressive models and in final layers for encoder models, and these same layers yield the strongest cross-modal predictability with textual representations of image captions. Notably, two independently trained models (DeepSeek-V3 and DinoV2) achieve stronger cross-modal predictability than the jointly trained CLIP model, suggesting that model scale may outweigh explicit multimodal training. Our results support the hypothesis of semantic convergence across languages, modalities, and architectures, while showing that directed predictability between representations varies strongly with layer-depth, model scale, and language.

light_analysis.overview: 通过Information Imbalance方法，量化分析了语义信息在文本和图像深度表示中的分布，揭示了跨语言和跨模态的语义收敛现象。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决如何量化分析深度表示中语义信息分布的问题。现有研究观察到不同模型处理相同或语义相关输入时表示会趋于对齐，但缺乏高效的量化方法来测量这种对齐程度和语义传播机制。因此，论文提出使用Information Imbalance方法，探索跨语言、跨模态的语义收敛现象，这对于理解模型内部表示、优化多模态学习和填补现有量化工具空白具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用Information Imbalance方法，这是一种不对称的基于排名的测量技术，作为交叉熵的高效代理，用于量化表示之间的预测能力。核心创新点在于能在高维空间中高效计算，避免了传统方法的计算复杂度。具体技术路线包括应用该方法到DeepSeek-V3处理翻译任务，分析层深度对语义信息的影响；同时在视觉域，使用自回归模型（如未指定具体模型，推断为常见架构）和编码器模型（如DinoV2），并与CLIP进行对比，以评估跨模态预测能力。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集，但涉及多个语言对和模型比较。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，语义信息广泛分布在多个令牌中，语义预测能力在网络的中间层最强，且在六个语言对中表现出稳健性。信息不对称性显著：英语表示比其他语言更预测性强，DeepSeek-V3的表示比小模型Llama3-8b更预测性强。在视觉域，语义信息在自回归模型的中间层集中，在编码器模型的最后一层集中，这些层与图像描述的文本表示具有最强的跨模态预测能力。值得注意的是，独立训练的模型（如DeepSeek-V3和DinoV2）比联合训练的CLIP模型表现出更强的跨模态预测能力，这表明模型规模可能超过显式多模态训练的效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献是支持了跨语言、跨模态和跨架构的语义收敛假设，同时揭示了表示间的定向预测能力随层深度、模型规模和语言变化而强烈差异。研究具有重要学术价值，提供了量化工具来理解语义信息分布，促进了模型内部机制分析和多模态学习优化。实际应用价值包括指导模型设计和跨模态任务改进。未来工作方向可能包括扩展到更多模型架构和任务，或进一步验证语义收敛的普适性，摘要未明确说明具体局限性，但可推断需要更多实验验证。

title: Time Tracker: Mixture-of-Experts-Enhanced Foundation Time Series Forecasting Model with Decoupled Training Pipelines
abstract: In the past few years, time series foundation models have achieved superior predicting accuracy. However, real-world time series often exhibit significant diversity in their temporal patterns across different time spans and domains, making it challenging for a single model architecture to fit all complex scenarios. In addition, time series data may have multiple variables exhibiting complex correlations between each other. Recent mainstream works have focused on modeling times series in a channel-independent manner in both pretraining and finetuning stages, overlooking the valuable inter-series dependencies. To this end, we propose Time Tracker for better predictions on multivariate time series data. Firstly, we leverage sparse mixture of experts (MoE) within Transformers to handle the modeling of diverse time series patterns, thereby alleviating the learning difficulties of a single model while improving its generalization. Besides, we propose Any-variate Attention, enabling a unified model structure to seamlessly handle both univariate and multivariate time series, thereby supporting channel-independent modeling during pretraining and channel-mixed modeling for finetuning.Furthermore, we design a graph learning module that constructs relations among sequences from frequency-domain features, providing more precise guidance to capture inter-series dependencies in channel-mixed modeling. Based on these advancements, Time Tracker achieves state-of-the-art performance in predicting accuracy, model generalization and adaptability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Time Tracker 模型，通过结合混合专家机制、Any-variate Attention 和图学习模块，显著提升多元时间序列预测的准确性、泛化能力和适应性。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机基于现实世界中时间序列数据的多样性和多变量间复杂关联，使单一模型难以适应所有场景。现有主流方法在预训练和微调阶段采用通道独立建模，忽视了序列间的依赖关系，限制了预测性能。因此，为解决多元时间序列预测中的这些挑战，需要开发一种新方法以更全面地利用序列间信息，提高模型的适应性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法采用 Transformer 架构，增强稀疏混合专家（MoE）来处理时间序列的多样模式，减轻单模型学习负担。创新点包括 Any-variate Attention，使模型能无缝处理单变量和多变量时间序列，支持预训练时的通道独立建模和微调时的通道混合建模。此外，设计图学习模块从频域特征构建序列间关系，精确指导捕获序列间依赖。技术特色在于整合 MoE、注意力机制和图学习，实现灵活的时间序列建模。
light_analysis.result: Time Tracker 在预测准确性、模型泛化和适应性方面达到最先进性能。摘要未明确说明具体数据指标，如准确率提升或效率改进。与基线方法相比，模型表现出更好的预测能力和适应性，通过混合专家机制提高了泛化，Any-variate Attention 增强了灵活性，图学习模块优化了依赖捕获。
light_analysis.conclusion: Time Tracker 通过混合专家增强、Any-variate Attention 和图学习模块，有效解决多元时间序列预测的多样性和依赖关系挑战。其主要贡献是提出统一模型结构，提升预测准确性和适应性。学术上强调了序列间建模的重要性，推动时间序列基础模型发展；实际应用中可广泛用于金融、气象等领域。未来工作可能涉及进一步优化或扩展到更多场景。

title: Signal in the Noise: Polysemantic Interference Transfers and Predicts Cross-Model Influence
abstract: Polysemanticity is pervasive in language models and remains a major challenge for interpretation and model behavioral control. Leveraging sparse autoencoders (SAEs), we map the polysemantic topology of two small models (Pythia-70M and GPT-2-Small) to identify SAE feature pairs that are semantically unrelated yet exhibit interference within models. We intervene at four foci (prompt, token, feature, neuron) and measure induced shifts in the next-token prediction distribution, uncovering polysemantic structures that expose a systematic vulnerability in these models. Critically, interventions distilled from counterintuitive interference patterns shared by two small models transfer reliably to larger instruction-tuned models (Llama-3.1-8B/70B-Instruct and Gemma-2-9B-Instruct), yielding predictable behavioral shifts without access to model internals. These findings challenge the view that polysemanticity is purely stochastic, demonstrating instead that interference structures generalize across scale and family. Such generalization suggests a convergent, higher-order organization of internal representations, which is only weakly aligned with intuition and structured by latent regularities, offering new possibilities for both black-box control and theoretical insight into human and artificial cognition.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文挑战了多义性在语言模型中纯属随机性的观点，揭示干扰结构可跨模型规模和家族泛化，为黑盒控制和认知理论提供新见解。
light_analysis.motivation: 多义性是语言模型中的普遍现象，对模型解释和行为控制构成主要挑战。现有研究多认为多义性是随机和难以预测的，导致模型行为理解不足。该研究旨在探索多义性背后的系统性结构，以解决解释性瓶颈和可控性问题，通过识别干扰模式为改善模型透明度和稳定性提供基础，推动AI安全和可解释性发展。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用稀疏自编码器（SAEs）映射两个小模型（Pythia-70M和GPT-2-Small）的多义性拓扑，识别语义无关但相互干扰的SAE特征对。在提示、令牌、特征、神经元四个焦点进行干预，测量下一个令牌预测分布的变化以揭示多义性结构。关键创新在于，将从干扰模式提取的干预方法可靠地转移到更大的指令调优模型（如Llama-3.1-8B/70B-Instruct和Gemma-2-9B-Instruct），实现无需访问模型内部的行为分析。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，干预揭示了多义性结构，暴露了模型的系统性脆弱性。从两个小模型提取的干扰模式能可靠地转移到更大模型，产生可预测的行为变化，表明干扰结构在模型规模和家族中具有泛化能力。这些发现挑战了多义性纯属随机的假设，并证明了内部表示存在收敛性和高阶组织，摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但突出了泛化的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论强调，多义性干扰结构具有系统性和可预测性，跨越不同模型泛化，暗示内部表示的收敛性、高阶组织与直觉弱对齐。这为黑盒控制提供了新可能性，同时加深了对人类和人工智能认知的理论理解。未来工作可进一步探索这种泛化的机制、应用潜力以及可能的局限性，以促进AI解释性和可控性研究。

title: Clust-Splitter - an Efficient Nonsmooth Optimization-Based Algorithm for Clustering Large Datasets
abstract: Clustering is a fundamental task in data mining and machine learning, particularly for analyzing large-scale data. In this paper, we introduce Clust-Splitter, an efficient algorithm based on nonsmooth optimization, designed to solve the minimum sum-of-squares clustering problem in very large datasets. The clustering task is approached through a sequence of three nonsmooth optimization problems: two auxiliary problems used to generate suitable starting points, followed by a main clustering formulation. To solve these problems effectively, the limited memory bundle method is combined with an incremental approach to develop the Clust-Splitter algorithm. We evaluate Clust-Splitter on real-world datasets characterized by both a large number of attributes and a large number of data points and compare its performance with several state-of-the-art large-scale clustering algorithms. Experimental results demonstrate the efficiency of the proposed method for clustering very large datasets, as well as the high quality of its solutions, which are on par with those of the best existing methods.
comment: 36 pages, 23 figures; first version. A revised version has been published in 'Advances in Data Analysis and Classification' (2026)

light_analysis.overview: Clust-Splitter是一种基于非光滑优化的高效算法，专门用于解决大规模数据集的最小和平方聚类问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 聚类是数据挖掘和机器学习的基础任务，但处理具有大量属性和数据点的大规模数据集时，现有方法可能在效率和可扩展性方面不足，导致难以高效获得高质量聚类结果。本研究旨在通过开发基于非光滑优化的算法，改进大规模数据聚类的性能，以应对大数据分析的挑战。摘要未明确说明具体不足之处，但通过比较先进算法隐含了改进需求。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Clust-Splitter算法，通过序列非光滑优化问题处理聚类任务：首先使用两个辅助优化问题生成合适的起始点，然后应用主聚类公式。关键技术结合了有限内存束方法和增量方法，以有效解决这些非光滑优化问题，从而在大规模数据集上提高计算效率和可扩展性。这种方法针对最小和平方聚类问题设计，适用于具有高维和大样本的数据。
light_analysis.result: 在具有大量属性和数据点的真实世界数据集上评估Clust-Splitter，并与多个先进大规模聚类算法比较。实验结果表明，该算法能高效处理非常大规模的数据集，聚类质量与现有最佳方法相当，验证了其在效率和解决方案质量上的优势。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率提升，但强调了整体表现的良好性。
light_analysis.conclusion: Clust-Splitter通过创新的非光滑优化序列和结合有限内存束方法，成功解决了大规模数据集的聚类问题，具有高效性和高聚类质量。该研究在学术上贡献了新的大规模优化方法，实际应用上为数据分析提供了有效工具。摘要未提及局限性或未来工作，但可推断未来可能涉及算法优化或扩展到其他聚类任务。

title: Explanations Go Linear: Post-hoc Explainability for Tabular Data with Interpretable Meta-Encoding
abstract: Post-hoc explainability is essential for understanding black-box machine learning models. Surrogate-based techniques are widely used for local and global model-agnostic explanations but have significant limitations. Local surrogates capture non-linearities but are computationally expensive and sensitive to parameters, while global surrogates are more efficient but struggle with complex local behaviors. In this paper, we present ILLUME, a flexible and interpretable framework grounded in representation learning, that can be integrated with various surrogate models to provide explanations for any black-box classifier. Specifically, our approach combines a globally trained surrogate with instance-specific linear transformations learned with a meta-encoder to generate both local and global explanations. Through extensive empirical evaluations, we demonstrate the effectiveness of ILLUME in producing feature attributions and decision rules that are not only accurate but also robust and computationally efficient, thus providing a unified explanation framework that effectively addresses the limitations of traditional surrogate methods.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出ILLUME框架，通过结合全局代理和元编码器，为表格数据的黑盒分类器提供准确、鲁棒且高效的本地和全局解释。
light_analysis.motivation: 后处理可解释性对理解黑盒机器学习模型至关重要。基于代理的技术虽广泛用于本地和全局解释，但存在显著局限：本地代理能捕捉非线性关系，但计算成本高且对参数敏感；全局代理更高效，但难以处理复杂的局部行为。因此，需要开发一种灵活、统一的方法来弥补现有不足，提升解释质量。
light_analysis.method: ILLUME框架基于表示学习，可集成各种代理模型。其核心创新是结合全局训练的代理与通过元编码器学习的实例特定线性变换，以动态生成本地和全局解释。元编码器通过学习调整线性变换来适应不同实例，提高了解释的灵活性和准确性，适用于任何黑盒分类器，特别针对表格数据设计。
light_analysis.result: 通过广泛实验评估，ILLUME在生成特征归因和决策规则方面表现出色，实现了高准确性、鲁棒性和计算效率。与传统代理方法相比，它有效解决了计算成本和解释质量之间的权衡问题，提供了一个统一框架来克服传统方法的局限性。摘要未明确给出具体性能指标，但强调了实验中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献是提出ILLUME框架，为后处理可解释性提供了一个统一方法，解决了本地和全局代理的固有缺陷。学术上推动了可解释AI的发展，特别是在表示学习的应用；实际上有助于提高黑盒模型的可信度和透明度。摘要未提及具体局限性，未来工作可能包括扩展到其他数据类型或更复杂模型。

title: Comparing Uncertainty Measurement and Mitigation Methods for Large Language Models: A Systematic Review
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have been transformative across many domains. However, hallucination, i.e., confidently outputting incorrect information, remains one of the leading challenges for LLMs. This raises the question of how to accurately assess and quantify the uncertainty of LLMs. Extensive literature on traditional models has explored Uncertainty Quantification (UQ) to measure uncertainty and employed calibration techniques to address the misalignment between uncertainty and accuracy. While some of these methods have been adapted for LLMs, the literature lacks an in-depth analysis of their effectiveness and does not offer a comprehensive benchmark to enable insightful comparison among existing solutions. In this work, we fill this gap via a systematic survey of representative prior works on UQ and calibration for LLMs and introduce a rigorous benchmark. Using two widely used reliability datasets, we empirically evaluate six related methods, which justify the significant findings of our review. Finally, we provide outlooks for key future directions and outline open challenges. To the best of our knowledge, this survey is the first dedicated study to review the calibration methods and relevant metrics for LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 本文首次对大语言模型的不确定性测量和校准方法进行了系统性调查和基准测试，填补了相关研究空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究的动机源于大语言模型在应用中存在幻觉问题，即自信地输出错误信息，这严重影响了模型的可靠性。目前，虽然传统模型的不确定性量化和校准方法已被广泛研究，部分技术已适应大语言模型，但现有文献缺乏对这些方法效果的深入分析，且缺少全面基准以便系统比较不同方案。这一问题的重要性在于，准确评估和缓解大语言模型的不确定性对于提升其在医疗、金融等关键领域的安全性和可信度至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括对代表性先前工作进行系统性调查，回顾大语言模型的不确定性量化和校准技术。同时，引入了一个严格的基准框架，使用两个广泛使用的可靠性数据集进行实证评估。研究详细评估了六种相关方法，通过对比分析来验证调查的核心发现，但没有明确说明具体模型架构或技术实现细节，主要聚焦于方法比较和基准测试的框架设计。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，通过基准测试评估了六种不确定性测量和缓解方法，验证了系统性调查的重要发现，强调了不同方法在大语言模型上的表现差异。实验使用可靠性数据集进行对比，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标（如准确率提升或误差减少），仅表明基准测试为现有解决方案提供了全面的比较依据，有助于识别有效的方法和改进方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是填补了大语言模型不确定性评估领域的文献空白，通过系统性调查和基准测试提供了首个专门研究校准方法及相关指标的综述。学术价值在于为后续研究提供了理论基础和比较框架，实际应用价值则在于帮助开发更可靠的大语言模型系统，减少幻觉问题。潜在的局限性可能包括数据集和方法范围的有限性，未来工作方向包括探索更多校准技术和扩展基准测试，以应对开放挑战如泛化性和实时应用。

title: SCAM: A Real-World Typographic Robustness Evaluation for Multimodal Foundation Models
abstract: Typographic attacks exploit the interplay between text and visual content in multimodal foundation models, causing misclassifications when misleading text is embedded within images. Existing datasets are limited in size and diversity, making it difficult to study such vulnerabilities. In this paper, we introduce SCAM, the largest and most diverse dataset of real-world typographic attack images to date, containing 1162 images across hundreds of object categories and attack words. Through extensive benchmarking of Vision-Language Models on SCAM, we demonstrate that typographic attacks significantly degrade performance, and identify that training data and model architecture influence the susceptibility to these attacks. Our findings indicate that typographic attacks remain effective against state-of-the-art Large Vision-Language Models, especially those employing vision encoders inherently vulnerable to such attacks. However, employing larger Large Language Model backbones reduces this vulnerability while simultaneously enhancing typographic understanding. Additionally, we demonstrate that synthetic attacks closely resemble real-world (handwritten) attacks, validating their use in research. Our work provides a comprehensive resource and empirical insights to facilitate future research toward robust and trustworthy multimodal AI systems. Finally, we publicly release the datasets introduced in this paper, along with the code for evaluations under www.bliss.berlin/research/scam.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了SCAM数据集，这是目前最大、最多样化的真实世界排版攻击图像数据集，用于评估多模态基础模型的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 排版攻击利用多模态模型中文本和视觉内容的交互，当误导性文本嵌入图像时，会导致模型误分类。现有数据集规模小、多样性有限，难以系统研究此类漏洞，阻碍了构建稳健多模态AI系统的进程。因此，开发一个更全面、更真实的评估资源至关重要，以深入理解模型脆弱性并推动实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入SCAM数据集，包含1162个真实世界图像，覆盖数百个对象类别和攻击词。通过广泛的视觉语言模型基准测试，分析训练数据和模型架构对鲁棒性的影响。关键创新在于结合合成与真实攻击的相似性验证，并公开数据集和代码，为研究提供实用工具。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，排版攻击显著降低视觉语言模型性能，先进大型视觉语言模型尤其易受攻击，特别是视觉编码器固有的脆弱性。使用更大的大型语言模型骨干可以减少脆弱性，并增强对排版的解析能力。合成攻击与真实攻击高度相似，验证了其在研究中的有效性，为后续工作提供了依据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过SCAM数据集提供了关键资源，揭示了排版攻击的持续有效性及其影响因素，对开发鲁棒多模态AI系统具有重要学术和实际价值。未来工作可基于此改进模型设计或探索防御机制。数据集和代码的公开促进了社区合作，加速了稳健AI技术的发展。

title: Impact of Data Duplication on Deep Neural Network-Based Image Classifiers: Robust vs. Standard Models
abstract: The accuracy and robustness of machine learning models against adversarial attacks are significantly influenced by factors such as training data quality, model architecture, the training process, and the deployment environment. In recent years, duplicated data in training sets, especially in language models, has attracted considerable attention. It has been shown that deduplication enhances both training performance and model accuracy in language models. While the importance of data quality in training image classifier Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) is widely recognized, the impact of duplicated images in the training set on model generalization and performance has received little attention.   In this paper, we address this gap and provide a comprehensive study on the effect of duplicates in image classification. Our analysis indicates that the presence of duplicated images in the training set not only negatively affects the efficiency of model training but also may result in lower accuracy of the image classifier. This negative impact of duplication on accuracy is particularly evident when duplicated data is non-uniform across classes or when duplication, whether uniform or non-uniform, occurs in the training set of an adversarially trained model. Even when duplicated samples are selected in a uniform way, increasing the amount of duplication does not lead to a significant improvement in accuracy.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究全面分析了训练集中重复图像对深度神经网络图像分类器的影响，发现重复数据会降低模型训练效率和准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器学习模型的准确性和鲁棒性对抗攻击的能力受数据质量等因素影响。语言模型中数据重复的影响已受广泛研究，去重能提升性能，但图像分类器中重复数据的影响尚未充分探讨，现有方法对此关注不足。本研究旨在填补这一空白，分析重复图像对模型泛化和性能的影响，特别是在对抗性训练模型中的效应，强调数据质量在图像分类中的重要性。
light_analysis.method: 论文进行了一项全面的研究，分析了训练集中重复图像对标准模型和对抗性训练模型的影响。方法可能包括实验设计、性能评估和对比分析，但摘要未明确说明具体的数据集、模型架构或技术细节。推断采用了实证分析方法，通过构建不同重复情况的训练集，评估模型在效率和准确性方面的表现。
light_analysis.result: 分析结果表明，训练集中重复图像的存在不仅降低模型训练效率，还导致分类准确性下降。非均匀重复或对抗性训练模型中的重复对准确性负面影响尤为明显。即使均匀重复，增加重复量也未显著提升准确性。摘要未提供具体性能指标数据，如准确率数字，但指出负面影响显著，并与标准训练模型进行了对比。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究填补了图像分类中数据重复影响的研究空白，强调了数据质量在训练深度神经网络中的重要性。学术上，揭示了重复数据对模型泛化的负面效应；实践中，对数据收集和预处理有指导意义，可帮助优化模型训练。潜在局限性或未来工作包括更深入分析重复影响的机制或开发去重策略。

title: High-Fidelity Diffusion Face Swapping with ID-Constrained Facial Conditioning
abstract: Face swapping aims to seamlessly transfer a source facial identity onto a target while preserving target attributes such as pose and expression. Diffusion models, known for their superior generative capabilities, have recently shown promise in advancing face-swapping quality. This paper addresses two key challenges in diffusion-based face swapping: the prioritized preservation of identity over target attributes and the inherent conflict between identity and attribute conditioning. To tackle these issues, we introduce an identity-constrained attribute-tuning framework for face swapping that first ensures identity preservation and then fine-tunes for attribute alignment, achieved through a decoupled condition injection. We further enhance fidelity by incorporating identity and adversarial losses in a post-training refinement stage. Our proposed identity-constrained diffusion-based face-swapping model outperforms existing methods in both qualitative and quantitative evaluations, demonstrating superior identity similarity and attribute consistency, achieving a new state-of-the-art performance in high-fidelity face swapping.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种身份约束的扩散模型框架，通过解耦条件注入和训练后细化，实现高保真面部交换，解决了身份与属性保留的冲突。
light_analysis.motivation: 面部交换旨在将源面部身份无缝转移到目标面部，同时保留目标属性如姿态和表情，这对视觉应用如娱乐和安防至关重要。扩散模型因其卓越生成能力在面部交换中展现出潜力，但现有方法面临两大挑战：优先确保身份保留时可能牺牲目标属性，以及身份和属性条件化之间的内在冲突。这限制了高质量面部交换的实现，需要新方法平衡两者以提升保真度。摘要未明确说明具体现有方法缺陷，但指出扩散模型在处理双重条件化时效果不足。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出一种身份约束的属性调整框架，首先通过强制身份条件来确保源身份准确转移，然后微调以对齐目标属性，这通过解耦条件注入实现，使身份和属性信息能独立处理以减少冲突。关键创新包括使用扩散模型作为生成基础，结合身份损失和对抗损失在训练后细化阶段，以增强交换图像的保真度。摘要未详细说明具体模型架构或数据集，但提到基于扩散模型的技术路线。
light_analysis.result: 论文在定性和定量评估中优于现有方法，展现出更高的身份相似性和属性一致性，达到了高保真面部交换的最新状态。具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进摘要未明确说明，但强调在评估中全面领先，表明该方法在解决身份与属性冲突方面效果显著，为面部交换领域设立了新基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 主要贡献是提出了一种创新框架，有效解决了扩散模型在面部交换中的身份与属性条件化冲突，提高了交换质量。研究具有学术价值，优化了扩散模型的应用，并具备实际应用价值，如用于高保真图像生成和娱乐产业。局限性或未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，但可推断可能包括扩展到更多面部属性或复杂场景。

title: Synergistic Bleeding Region and Point Detection in Laparoscopic Surgical Videos
abstract: Intraoperative bleeding in laparoscopic surgery causes rapid obscuration of the operative field to hinder the surgical process and increases the risk of postoperative complications. Intelligent detection of bleeding areas can quantify the blood loss to assist decision-making, while locating bleeding points helps surgeons quickly identify the source of bleeding and achieve hemostasis in time to improve surgical success rates. To fill the benchmark gap, we first construct a real-world laparoscopic surgical bleeding detection dataset, named SurgBlood, comprising 5,330 frames from 95 surgical video clips with bleeding region and point annotations. Accordingly, we develop a dual-task synergistic online detector called BlooDet, enabling simultaneous detection of bleeding regions and points in laparoscopic surgery. The baseline embraces a dual-branch bidirectional guid- ance design based on Segment Anything Model 2. The mask branch detects bleeding regions through adaptive edge and point prompt embeddings, while the point branch leverages mask memory to induce bleeding point memory modeling and captures point motion direction via inter-frame optical flow. By coupled bidirectional guidance, our framework explores spatial-temporal correlations while exploiting memory modeling to infer current bleeding status. Extensive experiments indicate that our method outperforms 13 counterparts in bleeding detection.
comment: This work has been accepted by CVPR 2026

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了BlooDet，一个基于Segment Anything Model 2的双分支检测器，能够协同检测腹腔镜手术视频中的出血区域和点。
light_analysis.motivation: 腹腔镜手术中出血会迅速模糊手术视野，阻碍手术进程并增加术后并发症风险。智能检测出血区域可量化失血量辅助决策，而定位出血点则帮助医生快速找到出血源及时止血，以提高手术成功率。现有方法缺乏基准数据集和同时检测区域与点的有效技术，导致检测效率不足。本研究旨在填补这一空白，构建数据集并开发协同检测方法。
light_analysis.method: 本研究开发了双任务协同在线检测器BlooDet，基于Segment Anything Model 2设计双分支双向指导架构。mask分支通过自适应边缘和点提示嵌入检测出血区域；point分支利用mask内存进行出血点内存建模，并通过帧间光流捕获点运动方向。双向指导机制探索时空相关性，结合内存建模推断当前出血状态。使用了自建数据集SurgBlood，包含5,330帧来自95个手术视频剪辑的标注。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，BlooDet在出血检测任务中优于13个对比方法。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率提升，但强调了方法在综合检测效果上的优越性。通过与基线方法对比，验证了协同设计和时空建模的有效性，提升了检测精度和效率，表明该方法在腹腔镜手术视频中的实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是构建了SurgBlood数据集并提出了BlooDet检测器，实现了出血区域和点的协同检测。学术上填补了基准空白，推动了计算机视觉在医疗领域的应用；实际上，有助于量化失血、辅助决策和及时止血，提高手术成功率。未来工作可扩展数据集或优化模型以适应更多临床场景。摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Learning Over Dirty Data with Minimal Repairs
abstract: Missing data often exists in real-world datasets, requiring significant time and effort for data repair to learn accurate models. In this paper, we show that imputing all missing values is not always necessary to achieve an accurate ML model. We introduce concepts of minimal and almost minimal repair, which are subsets of missing data items in training data whose imputation delivers accurate and reasonably accurate models, respectively. Imputing these subsets can significantly reduce the time, computational resources, and manual effort required for learning. We show that finding these subsets is NP-hard for some popular models and propose efficient approximation algorithms for wide range of models. Our extensive experiments indicate that our proposed algorithms can substantially reduce the time and effort required to learn on incomplete datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出最小修复概念，通过仅填充关键缺失数据子集来高效学习准确模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 现实世界数据集中常存在缺失数据，传统方法需要填充所有缺失值以训练准确模型，这消耗大量时间和计算资源。该研究旨在解决如何在不完整数据上高效学习的问题，现有方法可能过度修复数据，导致不必要的成本。因此，开发一种最小化数据修复工作的方法具有重要实践意义。
light_analysis.method: 本论文引入了最小修复和几乎最小修复的概念，即训练数据中缺失项的关键子集，填充这些子集可分别获得准确和相当准确的模型。针对某些流行模型，证明寻找这些子集是NP难题，因此提出高效的近似算法，适用于广泛的机器学习模型，以降低数据修复的计算复杂度。
light_analysis.result: 通过广泛实验验证，提出的近似算法能显著减少在不完整数据集上学习所需的时间和精力。与基线方法相比，算法在保持模型准确性的同时，大幅降低了数据修复的工作量。具体性能提升数据摘要未明确说明，但实验表明有实质性改善。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献在于提出了最小修复概念及相应算法，为处理缺失数据提供了高效解决方案。这不仅减少了数据预处理的资源需求，还拓展了在不完整数据上学习的新方法。学术上，揭示了相关问题的计算复杂性并设计了近似算法；实际应用中，可提升机器学习项目的效率。未来可探索算法在更多模型上的适用性和进一步优化。

title: Test-Time 3D Occupancy Prediction
abstract: Self-supervised 3D occupancy prediction offers a promising solution for understanding complex driving scenes without requiring costly 3D annotations. However, training dense occupancy decoders to capture fine-grained geometry and semantics can demand hundreds of GPU hours, and once trained, such models struggle to adapt to varying voxel resolutions or novel object categories without extensive retraining. To overcome these limitations, we propose a practical and flexible test-time occupancy prediction framework termed TT-Occ. Our method incrementally constructs, optimizes, and voxelizes time-aware 3D Gaussians from raw sensor streams by integrating vision foundation models (VFMs) at runtime. The flexible representation of 3D Gaussians enables voxelization at arbitrary user-specified resolutions, while the strong generalization capability of VFMs supports accurate perception and open-vocabulary recognition without requiring any network training or fine-tuning. To validate the generality and effectiveness of our framework, we present two variants: a LiDAR-based version and a vision-centric version, and conduct extensive experiments on the Occ3D-nuScenes and nuCraft benchmarks under varying voxel resolutions. Experimental results show that TT-Occ significantly outperforms existing computationally expensive pretrained self-supervised counterparts. Code is available at https://github.com/Xian-Bei/TT-Occ.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了一种无需训练的测试时 D 占用预测框架 TT-Occ，通过 D 高斯和视觉基础模型实现灵活体素化和开放词汇识别。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于自监督 D 占用预测虽能降低昂贵的三维注释成本，用于理解复杂驾驶场景，但现有方法训练密集占用解码器需要数百 GPU 小时，且一旦训练后难以适应不同体素分辨率或新对象类别，需大量重新训练。这种不灵活性限制了方法在多变现实场景中的实用性，如自动驾驶中分辨率变化和新物体出现常见，因此需要一种更灵活、高效的测试时预测框架来解决这些问题。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法提出了 TT-Occ 框架，在测试时从原始传感器流中增量构建、优化和体素化时间感知的 D 高斯。关键创新是运行时集成视觉基础模型（VFMs），利用其强泛化能力进行准确感知和开放词汇识别，无需任何网络训练或微调。D 高斯的灵活表示允许按用户指定分辨率进行体素化，提高了适应性。方法包含两个变体：基于 LiDAR 和基于视觉的版本，使用 OccD-nuScenes 和 nuCraft 数据集验证通用性。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果在 OccD-nuScenes 和 nuCraft 基准上进行，涵盖不同体素分辨率。实验表明，TT-Occ 显著优于现有的计算昂贵的预训练自监督方法，证明了其有效性和通用性。具体性能指标摘要未明确说明，但框架在不同设置下均展现出优越性，如在开放词汇识别和分辨率适应性方面有显著提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论是 TT-Occ 提供了一个实用灵活的测试时 D 占用预测解决方案，解决了现有方法的高成本和低灵活性问题。学术上，该方法展示了结合 D 高斯和 VFMs 实现无需训练占用预测的新途径；实际上，为自动驾驶等应用提供了高效、适应性强的感知工具。未来工作可探索更多传感器集成或进一步提升开放词汇识别的精度。

title: Adaptive UAV-Assisted Hierarchical Federated Learning: Optimizing Energy, Latency, and Resilience for Dynamic Smart IoT
abstract: Hierarchical Federated Learning (HFL) extends conventional Federated Learning (FL) by introducing intermediate aggregation layers, enabling distributed learning in geographically dispersed environments, particularly relevant for smart IoT systems, such as remote monitoring and battlefield operations, where cellular connectivity is limited. In these scenarios, UAVs serve as mobile aggregators, dynamically connecting terrestrial IoT devices. This paper investigates an HFL architecture with energy-constrained, dynamically deployed UAVs prone to communication disruptions. We propose a novel approach to minimize global training costs by formulating a joint optimization problem that integrates learning configuration, bandwidth allocation, and device-to-UAV association, ensuring timely global aggregation before UAV disconnections and redeployments. The problem accounts for dynamic IoT devices and intermittent UAV connectivity and is NP-hard. To tackle this, we decompose it into three subproblems: \textit{(i)} optimizing learning configuration and bandwidth allocation via an augmented Lagrangian to reduce training costs; \textit{(ii)} introducing a device fitness score based on data heterogeneity (via Kullback-Leibler divergence), device-to-UAV proximity, and computational resources, using a TD3-based algorithm for adaptive device-to-UAV assignment; \textit{(iii)} developing a low-complexity two-stage greedy strategy for UAV redeployment and global aggregator selection, ensuring efficient aggregation despite UAV disconnections. Experiments on diverse real-world datasets validate the approach, demonstrating cost reduction and robust performance under communication disruptions.
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Services Computing(22 pages, 11 figures)

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种自适应无人机辅助的层次联邦学习方法，通过联合优化学习配置、带宽分配和设备关联，以最小化动态智能物联网系统中的全局训练成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于智能物联网系统（如远程监控和战场操作）中蜂窝连接有限，需要分布式学习。层次联邦学习（HFL）通过引入中间聚合层适应地理分散环境，但无人机作为移动聚合器受能量限制、动态部署和通信中断影响，导致全局训练成本高和性能不稳定。现有方法未能有效整合优化学习配置、带宽分配和设备关联，以应对这些动态挑战，因此本研究旨在通过综合优化提升系统能源效率、延迟表现和韧性。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法提出一个联合优化问题，整合学习配置、带宽分配和设备到无人机关联，以最小化全局训练成本。由于问题NP-hard，将其分解为三个子问题：首先，使用增广拉格朗日方法优化学习配置和带宽分配；其次，基于数据异构性（通过Kullback-Leibler散度）、设备到无人机距离和计算资源，引入设备适应度分数，并采用基于TD3的强化学习算法进行自适应设备分配；最后，开发一个低复杂度的两阶段贪婪策略，用于无人机重新部署和全局聚合器选择，确保在通信中断时高效聚合。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果表明，所提出的方法在多样真实世界数据集上验证了有效性，能够显著降低全局训练成本，并在通信中断条件下展现出鲁棒性能。摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标数据（如准确率提升或效率改进数值），但通过与基线方法对比，证明了该方法在优化能源、延迟和韧性方面的优势，适用于动态智能物联网系统。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献在于提出了一种自适应无人机辅助的层次联邦学习方法，通过联合优化框架有效最小化动态智能物联网系统中的全局训练成本。该研究具有重要的学术价值，为分布式学习在动态和受限环境中的优化提供了新思路；实际应用上，可提升远程监控和战场操作等场景的系统韧性和效率。摘要未明确说明研究的局限性或未来工作方向。

title: Frequency Autoregressive Image Generation with Continuous Tokens
abstract: Autoregressive (AR) models for image generation typically adopt a two-stage paradigm of vector quantization and raster-scan ``next-token prediction", inspired by its great success in language modeling. However, due to the huge modality gap, image autoregressive models may require a systematic reevaluation from two perspectives: tokenizer format and regression direction. In this paper, we introduce the frequency progressive autoregressive (\textbf{FAR}) paradigm and instantiate FAR with the continuous tokenizer. Specifically, we identify spectral dependency as the desirable regression direction for FAR, wherein higher-frequency components build upon the lower one to progressively construct a complete image. This design seamlessly fits the causality requirement for autoregressive models and preserves the unique spatial locality of image data. Besides, we delve into the integration of FAR and the continuous tokenizer, introducing a series of techniques to address optimization challenges and improve the efficiency of training and inference processes. We demonstrate the efficacy of FAR through comprehensive experiments on the ImageNet dataset and verify its potential on text-to-image generation.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了频率渐进自回归（FAR）范式，结合连续tokenizer，通过频谱依赖改进图像生成的自回归模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归模型在图像生成中常采用基于语言建模的两阶段范式，包括向量量化和光栅扫描预测。然而，图像和语言之间存在巨大的模态差距，导致现有方法在tokenizer格式和回归方向上可能不适用于图像数据，未能充分利用图像的空间局部性和频谱依赖性。这限制了生成图像的质量和效率，因此需要系统性重新评估，以解决自回归模型在图像生成中的适应性问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入了频率渐进自回归（FAR）范式，使用连续tokenizer进行实例化。核心创新是将频谱依赖识别为理想的回归方向，使得更高频率的图像组件基于较低频率逐步构建完整图像，从而无缝适配自回归模型的因果关系要求并保留图像的空间局部性。此外，研究者深入探讨了FAR与连续tokenizer的集成，引入了一系列技术以解决优化挑战，提高训练和推理过程的效率。实验基于ImageNet数据集进行，但具体模型架构细节摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 通过ImageNet数据集的全面实验，FAR范式展示了其在图像生成中的有效性，改进了生成质量。摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标如准确率提升或效率改进数据，但表明FAR在自回归图像生成中具有潜在优势，并与基线方法进行了对比。实验还验证了FAR在文本到图像生成任务中的潜力，暗示其扩展性和跨模态应用的可能性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了频率渐进自回归（FAR）范式，结合连续tokenizer，通过频谱依赖优化图像生成，重新评估了自回归模型的tokenizer格式和回归方向。这具有重要的学术价值，为图像生成提供了新思路，实际应用中可以提升生成效率并扩展到文本到图像生成等任务。局限性或未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，但可能包括进一步优化和更广泛的数据集验证。

title: Offline Reinforcement Learning via Inverse Optimization
abstract: Inspired by the recent successes of Inverse Optimization (IO) across various application domains, we propose a novel offline Reinforcement Learning (ORL) algorithm for continuous state and action spaces, leveraging the convex loss function called ``sub-optimality loss'' from the IO literature. To mitigate the distribution shift commonly observed in ORL problems, we further employ a robust and non-causal Model Predictive Control (MPC) expert steering a nominal model of the dynamics using in-hindsight information stemming from the model mismatch. Unlike the existing literature, our robust MPC expert enjoys an exact and tractable convex reformulation. In the second part of this study, we show that the IO hypothesis class, trained by the proposed convex loss function, enjoys ample expressiveness and {reliably recovers teacher behavior in MuJoCo benchmarks. The method achieves competitive results compared to widely-used baselines in sample-constrained settings, despite using} orders of magnitude fewer parameters. To facilitate the reproducibility of our results, we provide an open-source package implementing the proposed algorithms and the experiments. The code is available at https://github.com/TolgaOk/offlineRLviaIO.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了一种基于逆优化的离线强化学习算法，通过稳健模型预测控制和凸损失函数，有效处理连续状态和动作空间中的分布偏移。
light_analysis.motivation: 离线强化学习（ORL）旨在从历史数据中学习策略，但常面临分布偏移问题，导致策略在部署时性能下降。现有方法可能处理偏移不够高效或计算复杂，限制了ORL的实际应用。本文受逆优化在多个领域成功应用的启发，旨在开发一种新算法来缓解ORL中的分布偏移，提高学习稳健性和效率，解决连续控制任务中的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种ORL算法，核心是使用逆优化（IO）中的“次优性损失”凸损失函数来定义训练目标。为缓解分布偏移，引入稳健和非因果的模型预测控制（MPC）专家，该专家利用模型不匹配的后见信息来指导动态模型。关键创新在于MPC专家具有精确且可处理的凸重构，简化了优化过程。方法还包括训练IO假设类，并在MuJoCo基准测试中进行验证，适用于连续状态和动作空间。
light_analysis.result: 实验在MuJoCo基准测试中进行，方法能够可靠地恢复教师行为。在样本受限的设置下，与广泛使用的基线方法相比，性能具有竞争力。尽管使用数量级更少的参数，方法在减少计算资源的同时保持了良好的学习效果，体现了参数效率的优势。具体对比显示，在类似条件下，方法在减少模型复杂度的同时不牺牲性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了一种结合逆优化和稳健MPC的离线强化学习框架，有效解决了分布偏移问题。学术上，为连续控制任务提供了高效且可处理的新方法；实践上，适用于机器人学习等应用场景。开源代码的提供促进了可复现性。未来工作可探索扩展到更复杂的环境或动态模型，以进一步提高通用性。

title: SALSA-RL: Stability Analysis in the Latent Space of Actions for Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Modern deep reinforcement learning (DRL) methods have made significant advances in handling continuous action spaces. However, real-world control systems, especially those requiring precise and reliable performance, often demand interpretability in the sense of a-priori assessments of agent behavior to identify safe or failure-prone interactions with environments. To address this limitation, this work proposes SALSA-RL (Stability Analysis in the Latent Space of Actions), a novel RL framework that models control actions as dynamic, time-dependent variables evolving within a latent space. By employing a pre-trained encoder-decoder and a state-dependent linear system, this approach enables interpretability through local stability analysis, where instantaneous growth in action-norms can be predicted before their execution. It is demonstrated that SALSA-RL can be deployed in a non-invasive manner for assessing the local stability of actions from pretrained RL agents without compromising on performance across diverse benchmark environments. By enabling a more interpretable analysis of action generation, SALSA-RL provides a powerful tool for advancing the design, analysis, and theoretical understanding of RL systems.

light_analysis.overview: SALSA-RL提出了一种通过动作潜在空间的稳定性分析来增强强化学习可解释性的新框架。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代深度强化学习在连续动作空间处理上取得进展，但现实世界控制系统如机器人或自动驾驶需要可解释性以评估行为安全性和可靠性。现有方法缺乏对代理行为先验评估的能力，导致在关键应用中可能存在风险，限制了DRL在需要精确控制和安全保证场景的应用。因此，本研究旨在解决DRL的可解释性不足问题，通过稳定性分析提升系统交互的预测性和可靠性，支持更安全的决策制定。
light_analysis.method: SALSA-RL框架将强化学习中的控制动作建模为动态、时间依赖变量，在潜在空间中演化。采用预训练的编码器-解码器结构和一个状态相关的线性系统，进行局部稳定性分析。关键创新点在于通过预测动作规范的瞬时增长，实现动作执行前的可解释性评估，该方法非侵入式地集成到预训练RL代理中，不改变原有模型架构，从而保持系统兼容性和灵活性。
light_analysis.result: 研究证明SALSA-RL能在不损害性能的前提下，在各种基准环境中评估动作的局部稳定性。摘要未明确提供具体性能数据如准确率或效率改进，但强调了框架的非侵入式特性确保了与现有方法的兼容性，这表明该方法在维持标准性能指标的同时，为RL系统提供了额外的安全性和可解释性分析能力，可能通过实验验证其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SALSA-RL的主要贡献是提供了一个强大的工具，用于强化学习动作生成的可解释性分析，促进系统设计、分析和理论理解。它具有学术价值，推动RL向更安全可靠的方向发展；实际应用价值在于支持安全关键系统的部署，如工业控制或自动驾驶。未来工作可能包括扩展到更复杂的环境或集成更多稳定性指标，以进一步增强框架的通用性和实用性。

title: Integrating Arithmetic Learning Improves Mathematical Reasoning in Smaller Models
abstract: While large models pre-trained on high-quality data exhibit excellent performance on mathematical reasoning (e.g., GSM8k, MultiArith), it remains challenging to specialize smaller models for these tasks. Common approaches to address this challenge include knowledge distillation from large teacher models and data augmentation (e.g., rephrasing questions and generating synthetic solutions). Despite these efforts, smaller models struggle with arithmetic computations, leading to errors in mathematical reasoning. In this work, we leverage a synthetic arithmetic dataset generated programmatically to enhance the reasoning capabilities of smaller models. We investigate two key approaches to incorporate this dataset: (1) intermediate fine-tuning, in which a model is fine-tuned on the arithmetic dataset before training it on a reasoning dataset, and (2) integrating the arithmetic dataset into an instruction-tuning mixture, allowing the model to learn arithmetic skills alongside general instruction-following abilities. Our experiments on multiple reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that incorporating an arithmetic dataset, whether through targeted fine-tuning or within an instruction-tuning mixture, enhances models' arithmetic capabilities, thereby improving their mathematical reasoning performance.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过集成算术学习，显著提升了小型模型在数学推理任务中的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前大型模型在数学推理任务（如GSM8k、MultiArith）上表现出色，但小型模型专攻这些任务仍面临挑战。常见方法如知识蒸馏和数据增强虽有一定帮助，但小型模型在算术计算方面仍存在不足，导致推理错误频发。这一问题限制了轻量级模型的实际应用，因此研究旨在通过增强算术能力来弥补这一缺陷，提升小型模型的整体推理性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文利用程序生成的合成算术数据集，探索两种方法增强小型模型的推理能力：一是中间微调，先在算术数据集上微调模型，再在推理数据集上训练；二是将算术数据集集成到指令调整混合物中，使模型同时学习算术技能和指令遵循能力。关键创新在于将算术学习融入训练流程，无需复杂的外部干预，适用于通用语言模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多个数学推理基准上进行，结果显示，通过中间微调或指令调整集成算术数据集，能有效增强模型的算术能力，从而改善数学推理性能。摘要未明确说明具体准确率或效率提升数据，但指出与基线方法相比，该方法在算术计算方面取得了改进，并可能在基准测试中提升了整体得分。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究表明，集成算术学习是提升小型模型数学推理能力的有效策略，贡献在于展示了简单方法（如中间微调）的实用性，为轻量级模型优化提供新思路，具有教育或自动化领域的应用价值。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他计算任务或探索更高效的训练方法。

title: Multilingual LLMs Struggle to Link Orthography and Semantics in Bilingual Word Processing
abstract: Bilingual lexical processing is shaped by the complex interplay of phonological, orthographic, and semantic features of two languages within an integrated mental lexicon. In humans, this is evident in the ease with which cognate words - words similar in both orthographic form and meaning (e.g., blind, meaning "sightless" in both English and German) - are processed, compared to the challenges posed by interlingual homographs, which share orthographic form but differ in meaning (e.g., gift, meaning "present" in English but "poison" in German). We investigate how multilingual Large Language Models (LLMs) handle such phenomena, focusing on English-Spanish, English-French, and English-German cognates, non-cognate, and interlingual homographs. Specifically, we evaluate their ability to disambiguate meanings and make semantic judgments, both when these word types are presented in isolation or within sentence contexts. Our findings reveal that while certain LLMs demonstrate strong performance in recognizing cognates and non-cognates in isolation, they exhibit significant difficulty in disambiguating interlingual homographs, often performing below random baselines. This suggests LLMs tend to rely heavily on orthographic similarities rather than semantic understanding when interpreting interlingual homographs. Further, we find LLMs exhibit difficulty in retrieving word meanings, with performance in isolative disambiguation tasks having no correlation with semantic understanding. Finally, we study how the LLM processes interlingual homographs in incongruent sentences. We find models to opt for different strategies in understanding English and non-English homographs, highlighting a lack of a unified approach to handling cross-lingual ambiguities.

light_analysis.overview: 多语言大型语言模型在处理跨语言同形异义词时，过度依赖正字相似性，导致语义消歧困难。
light_analysis.motivation: 双语词汇处理涉及正字、语音和语义特征的复杂互动，人类处理同源词容易而跨语言同形异义词困难。本研究旨在探究多语言大型语言模型如何处理这些现象，以评估其跨语言语义理解能力。现有方法可能依赖正字特征而非深层语义，导致在消歧跨语言同形异义词时表现不佳，这对LLMs在翻译和多语言自然语言处理任务中的实际应用至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出评估方法，测试多语言大型语言模型在英语-西班牙语、英语-法语、英语-德语语言对中处理同源词、非同源词和跨语言同形异义词的能力。方法包括将单词呈现为孤立或嵌入句子上下文，评估模型消歧意义和进行语义判断的性能。这强调了跨语言语义理解的挑战，并对比了不同上下文条件下的表现，以揭示模型的处理机制。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，某些多语言大型语言模型在孤立状态下识别同源词和非同源词表现良好，但在消歧跨语言同形异义词时表现显著困难，甚至低于随机基线。这表明模型倾向于依赖正字相似性而非语义理解。此外，孤立消歧任务表现与语义理解无相关性，模型在处理不一致句子中的跨语言同形异义词时采用不一致策略，缺乏统一方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究结论指出，多语言大型语言模型在处理跨语言同形异义词时存在缺陷，主要依赖正字相似性而非深层语义理解。这揭示了LLMs在跨语言语义处理上的局限性，对学术研究提供了关于模型语言学知识的重要见解。在实际应用中，这对提升多语言NLP系统的准确性和鲁棒性有指导意义，未来工作可探索如何增强模型的语义整合能力。

title: Manta: Enhancing Mamba for Few-Shot Action Recognition of Long Sub-Sequence
abstract: In few-shot action recognition (FSAR), long sub-sequences of video naturally express entire actions more effectively. However, the high computational complexity of mainstream Transformer-based methods limits their application. Recent Mamba demonstrates efficiency in modeling long sequences, but directly applying Mamba to FSAR overlooks the importance of local feature modeling and alignment. Moreover, long sub-sequences within the same class accumulate intra-class variance, which adversely impacts FSAR performance. To solve these challenges, we propose a Matryoshka MAmba and CoNtrasTive LeArning framework (Manta). Firstly, the Matryoshka Mamba introduces multiple Inner Modules to enhance local feature representation, rather than directly modeling global features. An Outer Module captures dependencies of timeline between these local features for implicit temporal alignment. Secondly, a hybrid contrastive learning paradigm, combining both supervised and unsupervised methods, is designed to mitigate the negative effects of intra-class variance accumulation. The Matryoshka Mamba and the hybrid contrastive learning paradigm operate in two parallel branches within Manta, enhancing Mamba for FSAR of long sub-sequence. Manta achieves new state-of-the-art performance on prominent benchmarks, including SSv2, Kinetics, UCF101, and HMDB51. Extensive empirical studies prove that Manta significantly improves FSAR of long sub-sequence from multiple perspectives.

light_analysis.overview: Manta框架通过引入嵌套Mamba结构和混合对比学习，有效提升长视频子序列的少样本动作识别性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在少样本动作识别中，长视频子序列能更全面地表达动作，但主流Transformer方法计算复杂度高，应用受限。Mamba虽在长序列建模中高效，但直接应用忽略了局部特征建模和对齐的重要性，且长子序列会累积类内方差，降低识别性能。因此，研究需解决这些挑战以提高准确性和效率，弥补现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: Manta采用Matryoshka Mamba和混合对比学习并行分支。Matryoshka Mamba通过多个Inner Module增强局部特征表示，而非直接建模全局特征；Outer Module捕获局部特征间的时间依赖，实现隐式时间对齐。混合对比学习结合监督和无监督方法，旨在减少类内方差累积的负面影响。这些创新点共同优化Mamba在少样本动作识别中的特征建模能力。
light_analysis.result: Manta在多个标准基准测试上取得新状态-of-the-art性能，包括SSv2、Kinetics、UCF101和HMDB51。大量实证研究表明，该方法从多角度显著改进长视频子序列的少样本动作识别效果，性能超越基线方法。摘要未明确说明具体数据，但强调了整体性能的显著提升和有效性验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: Manta通过集成Matryoshka Mamba和混合对比学习，解决了少样本动作识别中的局部特征建模和类内方差问题，提高了识别精度。学术价值在于扩展Mamba模型应用，并创新特征建模与对齐方法；实际应用价值在于增强视频动作识别的少样本学习能力。未来工作可探索更多数据集或进一步优化算法局限性。

title: Fine-Grained Uncertainty Quantification via Collisions
abstract: We propose a new and intuitive metric for aleatoric uncertainty quantification (UQ), the prevalence of class collisions defined as the same input being observed in different classes. We use the rate of class collisions to define the collision matrix, a novel and uniquely fine-grained measure of uncertainty. For a classification problem involving $K$ classes, the $K\times K$ collision matrix $S$ measures the inherent difficulty in distinguishing between each pair of classes. We discuss several applications of the collision matrix, establish its fundamental mathematical properties, and show its relationship with existing UQ methods, including the Bayes error rate (BER). We also address the new problem of estimating the collision matrix using one-hot labeled data by proposing a series of innovative techniques to estimate $S$. First, we learn a pair-wise contrastive model which accepts two inputs and determines if they belong to the same class. We then show that this contrastive model (which is PAC learnable) can be used to estimate the row Gramian matrix of $S$, defined as $G=SS^T$. Finally, we show that under reasonable assumptions, $G$ can be used to uniquely recover $S$, a new result on non-negative matrices which could be of independent interest. With a method to estimate $S$ established, we demonstrate how this estimate of $S$, in conjunction with the contrastive model, can be used to estimate the posterior class probability distribution of any point. Experimental results are also presented to validate our methods of estimating the collision matrix and class posterior distributions on several datasets.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出一种基于类别碰撞的新颖不确定性量化度量，并通过成对对比模型估计碰撞矩阵，实现细粒度不确定性分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 在机器学习分类任务中，不确定性量化对于评估模型可靠性和提升决策准确性至关重要。现有方法往往侧重于整体不确定性，而缺乏对类别间混淆的细粒度分析，导致在复杂场景下无法精确量化数据固有噪声和类别区分难度。本文旨在解决这一问题，通过引入类别碰撞作为不确定性度量，以更精细地评估分类任务的固有混淆，从而提高模型在边界模糊情况下的表现。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括定义碰撞矩阵S，用于量化K个类别间每对类别的区分难度。为了从one-hot标签数据中估计S，作者提出学习一个成对对比模型，该模型接受两个输入并判断它们是否属于同一类别。利用这个模型估计行Gramian矩阵G=SS^T，并基于非负矩阵理论证明在合理假设下可从G唯一恢复S，这是一个新的数学结果。此外，结合估计的碰撞矩阵和对比模型，可以计算任何数据点的后验类别概率分布，实现细粒度不确定性量化。
light_analysis.result: 论文在多个数据集上进行了实验，以验证所提估计碰撞矩阵和类别后验分布方法的有效性。实验结果展示了该方法在不确定性量化任务中的性能，但摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标数据，如准确率提升或与基线方法的对比细节。因此，基于现有信息，无法提供量化结果，但实验证实了方法的可行性，摘要未明确说明详细量化数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是引入了碰撞矩阵作为细粒度不确定性量化度量，并提出了有效的估计方法，包括成对对比模型和非负矩阵恢复技术。这一研究不仅丰富了不确定性量化理论，还为实际应用如分类模型评估提供了更精细的分析工具，具有学术和实用价值。未来工作可能包括将该方法扩展到更广泛的机器学习任务或与其他不确定性量化技术结合，以进一步验证其鲁棒性和适用性。

title: Den-TP: A Density-Balanced Data Curation and Evaluation Framework for Trajectory Prediction
abstract: Trajectory prediction in autonomous driving has traditionally been studied from a model-centric perspective. However, existing datasets exhibit a strong long-tail distribution in scenario density, where common low-density cases dominate and safety-critical high-density cases are severely underrepresented. This imbalance limits model robustness and hides failure modes when standard evaluations average errors across all scenarios. We revisit trajectory prediction from a data-centric perspective and present Den-TP, a framework for density-aware dataset curation and evaluation. Den-TP first partitions data into density-conditioned regions using agent count as a dataset-agnostic proxy for interaction complexity. It then applies a gradient-based submodular selection objective to choose representative samples within each region while explicitly rebalancing across densities. The resulting subset reduces the dataset size by 50\% yet preserves overall performance and significantly improves robustness in high-density scenarios. We further introduce density-conditioned evaluation protocols that reveal long-tail failure modes overlooked by conventional metrics. Experiments on Argoverse 1 and 2 with state-of-the-art models show that robust trajectory prediction depends not only on data scale, but also on balancing scenario density.

light_analysis.overview: Den-TP是一个密度感知的数据集管理和评估框架，旨在解决轨迹预测中场景密度不平衡问题，提高高密度场景的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决自动驾驶中轨迹预测数据集的长尾分布问题，即低密度场景占主导，而安全关键的高密度场景严重不足。现有方法侧重于模型改进，忽略了数据不平衡，导致模型在复杂交互场景下鲁棒性较差。标准评估方法在所有场景上平均错误会隐藏高密度场景的故障模式，这对于自动驾驶的安全性至关重要，因此需要从数据为中心的角度重新审视问题。
light_analysis.method: Den-TP框架采用数据分区的策略，使用代理计数作为交互复杂度的代理，将数据划分为不同密度条件的区域。然后，应用基于梯度的子模块选择目标，在每个区域内选择代表性样本，同时显式地重新平衡不同密度区域的样本分布，以生成一个平衡的数据子集，减少了数据集大小的50%。此外，引入了密度条件评估协议，用于更全面地评估模型在各类场景下的表现，以揭示传统指标忽略的问题。
light_analysis.result: 实验在Argoverse 1和2数据集上进行，使用前沿模型验证。结果显示，通过Den-TP生成的数据子集，虽然减少了50%的数据量，但仍保持了整体性能，并显著提高了在高密度场景下的鲁棒性。密度条件评估协议成功揭示了过去被传统评估方法忽视的长尾故障模式，表明平衡场景密度对于提升轨迹预测鲁棒性比单纯扩大数据规模更为重要。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了Den-TP框架，从数据为中心的角度强调轨迹预测中场景密度平衡的重要性。研究表明，通过密度感知的数据管理和评估，可以有效提升模型在高密度场景的安全性和鲁棒性，对自动驾驶的学术研究和实际应用具有重要价值。未来工作可以探索更多代理表示方法或将框架扩展到其他数据集，以验证其泛化能力。

title: SOAP: Enhancing Spatio-Temporal Relation and Motion Information Capturing for Few-Shot Action Recognition
abstract: High frame-rate (HFR) videos of action recognition improve fine-grained expression while reducing the spatio-temporal relation and motion information density. Thus, large amounts of video samples are continuously required for traditional data-driven training. However, samples are not always sufficient in real-world scenarios, promoting few-shot action recognition (FSAR) research. We observe that most recent FSAR works build spatio-temporal relation of video samples via temporal alignment after spatial feature extraction, cutting apart spatial and temporal features within samples. They also capture motion information via narrow perspectives between adjacent frames without considering density, leading to insufficient motion information capturing. Therefore, we propose a novel plug-and-play architecture for FSAR called Spatio-tempOral frAme tuPle enhancer (SOAP) in this paper. The model we designed with such architecture refers to SOAP-Net. Temporal connections between different feature channels and spatio-temporal relation of features are considered instead of simple feature extraction. Comprehensive motion information is also captured, using frame tuples with multiple frames containing more motion information than adjacent frames. Combining frame tuples of diverse frame counts further provides a broader perspective. SOAP-Net achieves new state-of-the-art performance across well-known benchmarks such as SthSthV2, Kinetics, UCF101, and HMDB51. Extensive empirical evaluations underscore the competitiveness, pluggability, generalization, and robustness of SOAP. The code is released at https://github.com/wenbohuang1002/SOAP.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出SOAP架构，通过增强时空关系和运动信息捕捉，显著提升了few-shot动作识别的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 高帧率视频在动作识别中虽然提高了细粒度表达，但降低了时空关系和运动信息密度，导致需要大量训练样本。然而，在实际应用中，样本往往不足，推动了few-shot动作识别研究。现有方法通常在空间特征提取后通过时间对齐构建时空关系，将空间和时间特征割裂，且仅从相邻帧狭窄视角捕捉运动信息，忽略密度问题，导致信息捕捉不足。因此，需要开发更有效的方法来克服这些限制，提高少样本场景下的识别能力。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种名为SOAP的插拔式架构，核心是时空帧元组增强器，用于few-shot动作识别。模型SOAP-Net创新地使用帧元组来捕捉运动信息，这些元组包含多帧，相比相邻帧提供更丰富的运动数据。同时，该方法考虑不同特征通道间的时间连接和特征的时空关系，而非简单特征提取。结合不同帧数的元组，提供了更广泛的视角，增强了信息捕捉的全面性。架构设计灵活，易于集成到现有系统中。
light_analysis.result: SOAP-Net在多个知名基准测试中取得了最先进的性能，包括SthSthV2、Kinetics、UCF101和HMDB51。广泛的实证评估表明，该方法具有竞争力、可插拔性、泛化性和鲁棒性。尽管摘要未提供具体准确率等量化数据，但结果显示其在few-shot动作识别任务中优于现有基线，证明了其在提升性能方面的有效性。实验强调了该方法在不同数据集上的稳定表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出了SOAP架构，通过增强时空关系和运动信息捕捉，改进了few-shot动作识别的性能。该研究具有重要的学术价值，为少样本学习提供了新的技术路径，并在视频分析等实际应用中显示出潜力。局限性方面，摘要未明确说明未来工作方向，但可以推断可能需要进一步优化参数或扩展到更复杂的场景。整体上，该方法为解决样本不足问题提供了有效解决方案。

title: Demystifying amortized causal discovery with transformers
abstract: Supervised learning for causal discovery from observational data often achieves competitive performance despite seemingly avoiding the explicit assumptions that traditional methods require for identifiability. In this work, we analyze CSIvA (Ke et al., 2023) on bivariate causal models, a transformer architecture for amortized inference promising to train on synthetic data and transfer to real ones. First, we bridge the gap with identifiability theory, showing that the training distribution implicitly defines a prior on the causal model of the test observations: consistent with classical approaches, good performance is achieved when we have a good prior on the test data, and the underlying model is identifiable. Second, we find that CSIvA can not generalize to classes of causal models unseen during training: to overcome this limitation, we theoretically and empirically analyze \textit{when} training CSIvA on datasets generated by multiple identifiable causal models with different structural assumptions improves its generalization at test time. Overall, we find that amortized causal discovery with transformers still adheres to identifiability theory, violating the previous hypothesis from Lopez-Paz et al. (2015) that supervised learning methods could overcome its restrictions.

light_analysis.overview: 本文分析使用Transformer的摊销因果发现方法（CSIvA），发现其仍受可识别性理论约束，挑战了监督学习可超越传统限制的假设。
light_analysis.motivation: 监督学习在因果发现中常表现优秀，似乎避免了传统方法所需的显式可识别性假设，这引发了对其是否真的能克服限制的疑问。本研究旨在检验这一假设，基于CSIvA架构，探讨摊销因果发现方法的理论基础。现有方法声称能通过合成数据训练泛化到真实数据，但缺乏对泛化能力和可识别性关系的深入分析，本文填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用理论和实证分析，聚焦于CSIvA，一种基于Transformer的摊销推理架构，用于从观测数据中进行因果发现。方法包括在二元因果模型上分析训练分布如何隐式定义测试数据的先验，并研究通过训练在多个可识别因果模型生成的数据集上，以改善模型在未见类别中的泛化能力。关键创新是结合可识别性理论，评估监督学习的局限性。
light_analysis.result: 研究发现CSIvA的性能依赖于训练分布定义的先验：当测试数据先验良好且底层模型可识别时，性能佳，与传统方法一致。但CSIvA不能泛化到训练中未见的因果模型类别；通过理论和实证分析，表明在多样可识别模型数据集上训练可改善泛化。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率，但强调了泛化改进的实证结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是证明摊销因果发现仍遵循可识别性理论，否定了监督学习能克服传统限制的假设。这具有重要学术价值，澄清了因果发现方法的理论基础，并为未来研究方向提供了指导，如增强泛化能力或结合更多先验知识。潜在局限性在于仅分析二元模型，未来可扩展到更复杂场景。

title: MultiMedEval: A Benchmark and a Toolkit for Evaluating Medical Vision-Language Models
abstract: We introduce MultiMedEval, an open-source toolkit for fair and reproducible evaluation of large, medical vision-language models (VLM). MultiMedEval comprehensively assesses the models' performance on a broad array of six multi-modal tasks, conducted over 23 datasets, and spanning over 11 medical domains. The chosen tasks and performance metrics are based on their widespread adoption in the community and their diversity, ensuring a thorough evaluation of the model's overall generalizability. We open-source a Python toolkit (github.com/corentin-ryr/MultiMedEval) with a simple interface and setup process, enabling the evaluation of any VLM in just a few lines of code. Our goal is to simplify the intricate landscape of VLM evaluation, thus promoting fair and uniform benchmarking of future models.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了一个名为MultiMedEval的开源工具包和基准，用于公平和可重复地评估医学视觉-语言模型。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学视觉-语言模型评估领域缺乏统一标准，现有方法分散且难以实现公平比较，导致模型性能评估不一致。本研究旨在解决这一问题，通过开发一个全面的评估框架来促进标准化基准测试。这有助于确保模型在多样化医疗应用中的可靠性和泛化能力，提高研究效率和模型部署的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 论文通过设计一个综合评估套件来实现方法，涵盖六个多模态任务、23个数据集和11个医学领域，基于社区广泛采用的任务和指标确保评估的多样性。核心创新包括开源Python工具包（github.com/corentin-ryr/MultiMedEval），提供简单界面和快速部署，用户只需几行代码即可评估任何VLM，强调可重复性和公平性。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验数据，但论文发布了MultiMedEval工具包，建立了标准化的评估框架。该工具包简化了评估流程，使研究人员能便捷测试模型在多样医学任务上的性能。与现有分散方法相比，它提供了更公平和一致的基准，但未提及与基线模型的具体性能对比或准确率提升等指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是推出了MultiMedEval工具包，为医学视觉-语言模型评估提供了标准化方法。学术价值在于促进了评估的公平性和可重复性，推动了领域进展；实际应用价值是帮助研究人员高效评估和比较模型。未来工作可能包括扩展更多任务和数据集，以增强评估的全面性和适应性。

title: Feature Space Renormalization for Semi-supervised Learning
abstract: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) has been proven to be a powerful method for leveraging unlabeled data to alleviate models'dependence on large labeled datasets. The common framework among recent approaches is to train the model on a large amount of unlabeled data with consistency regularization to constrain the model predictions to be invariant to input perturbation. This paper proposes a feature space renormalizati-on (FSR) mechanism for SSL, which imposes consistency on feature representations rather than on labels to enable the model to learn better discriminative features. In order to apply this mechanism to SSL, we design a dual-branch FSR module consisting of a dual-branch header and an FSR block. This module can be seamlessly plugged and played into existing SSL frameworks to enhance the performance of the base SSL. The experimental results show that our proposed FSR module helps the base SSL framework (e.g. CRMatch and FreeMatch), achieve better performance on a variety of standard SSL benchmark datasets, without incurring additional overhead in terms of computation time and GPU memory.

light_analysis.overview: 提出特征空间重归一化机制，用于半监督学习，通过特征表示的一致性正则化提升模型判别能力，无需额外计算开销。
light_analysis.motivation: 半监督学习能有效利用未标记数据，降低对大规模标记数据集的依赖。现有方法通常采用一致性正则化约束模型预测在输入扰动下的不变性，但可能忽视特征表示的优化，导致特征学习不足。本研究旨在解决这一问题，通过将一致性从标签空间转移到特征空间，使模型学习更具判别性的特征，从而提高半监督学习的性能和效率，这对于数据稀缺场景尤为重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文设计了特征空间重归一化机制，具体实现为双分支FSR模块，包括双分支头和FSR块。该模块可无缝插入现有半监督学习框架中，通过在特征空间而非标签空间施加一致性正则化，增强模型的判别性特征学习能力。创新点在于利用特征空间的重归一化处理，提升特征表示的鲁棒性，同时保持计算效率，摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集和模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，提出的FSR模块显著提升了基础半监督学习框架（如CRMatch和FreeMatch）在多种标准基准数据集上的性能。与基线方法相比，模型实现了更高的准确率，同时未增加计算时间和GPU内存的额外开销，证明了该方法的有效性和实用性，但摘要未明确说明具体性能提升百分比等详细数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了特征空间重归一化机制，为半监督学习提供了一种新的特征优化方法，通过特征表示的一致性正则化增强了模型的判别能力。学术上丰富了正则化技术，实际应用中可轻松集成现有框架以提升性能，潜在局限性或未来工作方向未在摘要中明确说明，但可考虑扩展到其他学习任务或进一步优化模块设计。

title: QFT: Quantized Full-parameter Tuning of LLMs with Affordable Resources
