abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have showcased remarkable impacts across a wide spectrum of natural language processing tasks. Fine-tuning these pretrained models on downstream datasets provides further significant performance gains; however, this process typically requires a large number of expensive, high-end GPUs. Although there have been efforts focused on parameter-efficient fine-tuning, they cannot fully unlock the powerful potential of full-parameter fine-tuning. In this paper, we propose QFT, a Quantized Full-parameter Tuning framework for LLMs that quantizes and stores all training states, including weights, gradients, and optimizer states, in INT8 format to reduce training memory, thereby enabling full-parameter fine-tuning on existing GPUs at an affordable cost. To ensure training performance, we make two key efforts: i) for quantized gradients and optimizer states, we theoretically prove that the Lion optimizer, with its property of consistent update magnitudes, is highly robust to quantization; ii) and for quantized weights, we employ the hybrid feature quantizer, which identifies and protects a small subset of sparse critical features while quantizing the remaining dense features, thus ensuring accurate weight updates without FP32 backups. Moreover, to support backpropagation in the integer context, we develop a stack-based gradient flow scheme with O(1) complexity, forming a unified integer training pipeline. As a result, QFT reduces the model state memory to 21% of the standard solution while achieving comparable performance, e.g., tuning a LLaMA-7B model requires only <30GB of memory, making it feasible on a single A6000 GPU.
comment: ICLR 2026 Workshop on Scaling Post-training for LLMs (SPOT)

light_analysis.overview: 提出QFT框架，通过量化所有训练状态为INT8，实现大语言模型全参数微调，显著降低内存需求。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型微调能显著提升下游任务性能，但传统全参数微调需大量昂贵高端GPU资源，限制了广泛应用。参数高效微调方法虽降低资源需求，却无法充分发挥全参数微调的潜力，导致性能瓶颈。因此，迫切需要一种经济高效的方法来实现全参数微调，以平衡性能与成本。
light_analysis.method: QFT框架量化权重、梯度和优化器状态为INT8格式以减少训练内存。关键创新包括：使用Lion优化器，其更新幅度一致性确保对量化的鲁棒性；采用混合特征量化器保护稀疏关键特征并量化稠密特征，避免FP32备份；开发栈基梯度流方案支持整数反向传播，复杂度O(1)，形成统一整数训练管道，未明确使用数据集细节。
light_analysis.result: QFT将模型状态内存降低至标准解决方案的21%，同时保持可比性能。例如，微调LLaMA-7B模型仅需<30GB内存，可在单块A6000 GPU上实现，显著优于资源密集型基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文提出QFT框架，成功实现大语言模型量化全参数微调，降低资源门槛，推动高效微调技术的发展。其学术价值在于创新整数训练方法，实际应用价值在于使更多资源受限场景也能训练大模型，摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作。

title: A Survey of Large Language Models
abstract: Language is essentially a complex, intricate system of human expressions governed by grammatical rules. It poses a significant challenge to develop capable AI algorithms for comprehending and grasping a language. As a major approach, language modeling has been widely studied for language understanding and generation in the past two decades, evolving from statistical language models to neural language models. Recently, pre-trained language models (PLMs) have been proposed by pre-training Transformer models over large-scale corpora, showing strong capabilities in solving various NLP tasks. Since researchers have found that model scaling can lead to performance improvement, they further study the scaling effect by increasing the model size to an even larger size. Interestingly, when the parameter scale exceeds a certain level, these enlarged language models not only achieve a significant performance improvement but also show some special abilities that are not present in small-scale language models. To discriminate the difference in parameter scale, the research community has coined the term large language models (LLM) for the PLMs of significant size. Recently, the research on LLMs has been largely advanced by both academia and industry, and a remarkable progress is the launch of ChatGPT, which has attracted widespread attention from society. The technical evolution of LLMs has been making an important impact on the entire AI community, which would revolutionize the way how we develop and use AI algorithms. In this survey, we review the recent advances of LLMs by introducing the background, key findings, and mainstream techniques. In particular, we focus on four major aspects of LLMs, namely pre-training, adaptation tuning, utilization, and capacity evaluation. Besides, we also summarize the available resources for developing LLMs and discuss the remaining issues for future directions.

light_analysis.overview: 本综述论文系统回顾了大语言模型（LLM）的近期进展，通过介绍背景、关键发现和主流技术，聚焦于预训练、适应调优、利用和容量评估四个主要方面。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言建模作为AI理解与生成语言的核心方法，历经从统计到神经模型的演变，预训练语言模型（PLMs）基于Transformer在大规模语料上预训练，展现出强大能力。研究者发现模型缩放能提升性能，当参数规模超过阈值时，大语言模型（LLM）不仅性能显著提升，还展现出小模型不具备的特殊能力，如ChatGPT的发布引发社会广泛关注。随着LLMs快速发展，现有综述可能不够全面，因此需要系统性总结其技术背景、关键发现和主流技术，以指导未来研究和应用。
light_analysis.method: 本研究采用综述方法，系统性回顾大语言模型（LLM）的近期发展，核心基于对现有文献的分析。技术路线聚焦于四个关键方面：预训练技术，涉及Transformer模型在大规模语料上的训练过程；适应调优，指模型在特定任务上的微调和优化策略；利用方式，包括LLMs在各种NLP任务中的应用；以及容量评估，探讨模型性能的测量和比较标准。通过整合这些方面，论文提供了一个全面的技术框架，帮助读者理解LLMs的演进路径，但摘要未明确说明具体的文献搜索或分析策略。
light_analysis.result: 综述总结了大语言模型（LLM）的主要研究成果：通过模型缩放，LLMs在参数规模超过一定水平后，不仅实现了显著的性能提升，还展现出如上下文学习、推理能力等特殊技能。这些发现基于现有研究，例如ChatGPT等模型的成功应用，显示了LLMs在多种NLP任务上的强大能力。然而，摘要未提供具体的实验数据或与基线方法的详细对比，而是概括性地描述了性能改进和新兴能力，综述还指出LLMs的技术进步正在推动AI算法发展，但具体量化结果需参考原始研究。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本综述的主要贡献在于系统回顾了大语言模型（LLM）的近期进展，提供了背景介绍、关键技术分析和资源总结。通过聚焦预训练、适应调优、利用和容量评估四个方面，论文帮助学术界和工业界全面理解LLMs的发展现状。学术价值体现在整合分散的研究成果，为未来研究提供参考；实际价值在于指导AI开发者有效利用LLMs技术。此外，论文讨论了剩余问题和未来方向，如模型效率、伦理考量等，指出了LLMs研究中的挑战和机遇，为领域持续发展奠定理论基础。

title: Aergia: Leveraging Heterogeneity in Federated Learning Systems
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) is a popular approach for distributed deep learning that prevents the pooling of large amounts of data in a central server. FL relies on clients to update a global model using their local datasets. Classical FL algorithms use a central federator that, for each training round, waits for all clients to send their model updates before aggregating them. In practical deployments, clients might have different computing powers and network capabilities, which might lead slow clients to become performance bottlenecks. Previous works have suggested to use a deadline for each learning round so that the federator ignores the late updates of slow clients, or so that clients send partially trained models before the deadline. To speed up the training process, we instead propose Aergia, a novel approach where slow clients (i) freeze the part of their model that is the most computationally intensive to train; (ii) train the unfrozen part of their model; and (iii) offload the training of the frozen part of their model to a faster client that trains it using its own dataset. The offloading decisions are orchestrated by the federator based on the training speed that clients report and on the similarities between their datasets, which are privately evaluated thanks to a trusted execution environment. We show through extensive experiments that Aergia maintains high accuracy and significantly reduces the training time under heterogeneous settings by up to 27% and 53% compared to FedAvg and TiFL, respectively.
comment: This paper is accepted at the 23rd ACM/IFIP International Middleware Conference (Middleware '22). Updated version has minor textual improvements

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出Aergia方法，通过模型部分冻结和任务卸载，有效加速异构联邦学习系统的训练过程。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习在分布式深度学习中广泛应用，但实际部署时客户端计算和网络能力差异导致慢客户端成为性能瓶颈，拖累整体训练速度。现有方法如设置训练轮次截止日期来忽略慢客户端更新或发送部分模型，可能牺牲模型准确性或资源利用率。为解决这些问题，Aergia旨在优化异构环境下的联邦学习效率，提升训练速度和系统鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: Aergia方法的核心在于让慢客户端识别并冻结模型计算密集型部分，仅训练未冻结部分，以降低本地计算负载。同时，将冻结部分卸载到拥有更快硬件的客户端进行训练，利用其数据集加速。卸载决策由中央联邦者协调，基于客户端报告的训练速度和数据集相似性评估（通过可信执行环境保护数据隐私），优化资源分配和模型更新过程，实现高效异构训练。
light_analysis.result: 通过广泛实验验证，Aergia在异构设置下能维持高模型准确性，同时显著缩短训练时间。具体数据显示，与基线方法FedAvg和TiFL相比，训练时间分别减少了27%和53%，有效平衡了性能与效率。这表明Aergia在处理客户端异构性方面优于传统方法，提升了联邦学习系统的整体训练速度。
light_analysis.conclusion: Aergia研究通过创新性地结合模型冻结和任务卸载技术，为解决联邦学习中的客户端异构问题提供了有效方案。该方法不仅提高了训练效率，还保持了模型准确性，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力，如边缘计算和分布式AI系统。未来工作可能扩展到更复杂场景或进一步优化隐私保护机制。

title: HighAir: A Hierarchical Graph Neural Network-Based Air Quality Forecasting Method
abstract: Accurately forecasting air quality is critical to protecting general public from lung and heart diseases. This is a challenging task due to the complicated interactions among distinct pollution sources and various other influencing factors. Existing air quality forecasting methods cannot effectively model the diffusion processes of air pollutants between cities and monitoring stations, which may suddenly deteriorate the air quality of a region. In this paper, we propose HighAir, i.e., a hierarchical graph neural network-based air quality forecasting method, which adopts an encoder-decoder architecture and considers complex air quality influencing factors, e.g., weather and land usage. Specifically, we construct a city-level graph and station-level graphs from a hierarchical perspective, which can consider city-level and station-level patterns, respectively. We design two strategies, i.e., upper delivery and lower updating, to implement the inter-level interactions, and introduce message passing mechanism to implement the intra-level interactions. We dynamically adjust edge weights based on wind direction to model the correlations between dynamic factors and air quality. We compare HighAir with the state-of-the-art air quality forecasting methods on the dataset of Yangtze River Delta city group, which covers 10 major cities within 61,500 km2. The experimental results show that HighAir significantly outperforms other methods.

light_analysis.overview: HighAir提出了一种基于分层图神经网络的空气质量预测方法，通过建模城市级和站点级的交互来提高预测精度。
light_analysis.motivation: 空气质量预测对保护公众免受肺部和心脏疾病至关重要，但由于不同污染源及其他因素（如天气和土地利用）的复杂交互，现有方法难以有效建模空气污染物在城市和监测站点之间的扩散过程，这可能导致区域空气质量突然恶化。因此，需要一种新方法来捕捉这些动态交互以改善预测准确性。
light_analysis.method: HighAir采用编码器-解码器架构，从分层角度构建城市级图和站点级图，分别捕捉城市级和站点级模式。设计上层交付和下层更新策略实现层级间交互，引入消息传递机制处理层级内交互，并基于风向动态调整图边权重以建模动态因素与空气质量的相关性。实验在长江三角洲城市群数据集上进行，覆盖10个城市和61,500平方公里区域。
light_analysis.result: 实验在长江三角洲城市群数据集上对比了HighAir与其他最先进的空气质量预测方法。结果表明，HighAir显著优于这些方法，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标（如准确率或效率提升的具体数值）。
light_analysis.conclusion: HighAir的主要贡献是提出一种分层图神经网络方法，有效建模空气质量预测中的复杂交互，提升了预测性能。该研究在学术上推动了图神经网络在环境科学领域的应用，实际中可改善空气质量预警系统。未来工作可能包括扩展到更大区域或整合更多动态因素。
